\"edit\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n## Quick Reference\n[](#quick-reference)\nThe complete[documentation can be found here](https://kruschid.github.io/typesafe-routes).\n* Functions\n* &#96;renderPath&#96;: renders a path with parameters\n* &#96;renderQuery&#96;: renders a search query\n* &#96;render&#96;: renders a path with parameters including query string\n* &#96;template&#96;: renders a route template\n* &#96;parsePath&#96;: parses dynamic segments in a path\n* &#96;parseQuery&#96;: parses parameters in a search query\n* &#96;parse&#96;: parses path and search query for parameters\n* &#96;replace&#96;: partially replaces dynamic segments and query params in a string-based path (i.e.&#96;location.path&#96;)\n## Installation\n[](#installation)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nnpm i typesafe-routes#or any npm alternative\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n## How to Contribute\n[](#how-to-contribute)\n* leave a star ⭐* report a bug 🐞* open a pull request 🏗️* please discuss your idea on github or discord**before you start working on your PR**\n* help others ❤️* [buy me a coffee ☕](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kruschid)\n[![Buy Me A Coffee](https://cdn.buymeacoffee.com/buttons/v2/default-orange.png)](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kruschid)\n## Roadmap\n[](#roadmap)\n* v10-v12 migration guide\n* v12beta-v12.1 migration guide\n* check for duplicate param names in the route tree\n* customizable parsing of search params (for example with qs)\n* demos &amp;amp; ---

You have a few options to fix this:

## Option 1: Upgrade `typesafe-routes` (Recommended)

The latest version is **12.3.0** which supports modern TypeScript. Since you're on v9, there are likely some API changes, but it's the cleanest solution:

```bash
npm install typesafe-routes@latest
```

Note: This is a major version upgrade (9 → 12), so you may need to update your code. Check the [migration guide](https://kruschid.github.io/typesafe-routes) for any breaking changes.

## Option 2: Use `--legacy-peer-deps` (Quick Workaround)

If you want to proceed without changing the package version:

```bash
npm install --legacy-peer-deps
```

This tells npm to ignore peer dependency conflicts. The package may still work since TypeScript 5.x is largely backwards compatible, but it's not guaranteed.

## Option 3: Add to `.npmrc` (Persistent Workaround)

To make the legacy peer deps behavior permanent, create or edit `.npmrc` in your project root:

```
legacy-peer-deps=true
```

---

**My recommendation**: Go with **Option 1** (upgrade to latest). The package is actively maintained and the newer version will have better compatibility with your modern TypeScript 5.9.3 setup. Would you like me to help you upgrade?

[Search code, repositories, users, issues, pull requests...](https://github.com/fredericoo/react-router-typesafe)<br/><br/># TypeSafe React Router Solutions for TypeScript 5 and React Router 6+<br/><br/>## Main Options<br/><br/>**react-router-typesafe-routes** is the primary solution. It provides enhanced type safety for all route parameters (pathname params, search params, state, and hash) with validation support.[1][3] It requires TypeScript 5.0+ with strict mode enabled and works with React Router v7.[1][3] The library supports optional integrations with Standard Schema, Zod, and Yup for validation.[3]<br/><br/>**react-router-typesafe** by fredericoo is an alternative with 115 GitHub stars that provides TypeScript-first routing for React Router.[5]<br/><br/>**react-typesafe-routes** by innFactory is another option with a focus on being a comprehensive routing solution for react-router-dom projects.[2]<br/><br/>## Built-in Type Safety in React Router<br/><br/>React Router 7 now includes native route module type safety capabilities. It generates route-specific types automatically to power type inference for URL params and loader data, without requiring third-party libraries.[4]<br/><br/>## Key Features of react-router-typesafe-routes<br/><br/>- No unsafe type casts<br/>- Customizable parsing and validation with error handling<br/>- Support for gradual adoption<br/>- Compatible with nested routes and relative links<br/>- First-party support for major validation libraries[3]<br/><br/>All three libraries are actively maintained and compatible with modern React Router (v6+) and TypeScript 5. |

---

Based on your usage, here are the best alternatives:

## Option 1: **Upgrade to typesafe-routes v12** (Easiest)

Your usage is simple enough that upgrading should be straightforward. The v12 API is similar but uses different function names:

```typescript
// v9 (current)
import { route, intParser } from "typesafe-routes";
const editFormRoute = route(":id/edit", { id: intParser }, {});

// v12 (new)
import { createRoutes, int } from "typesafe-routes";
const routes = createRoutes({
  edit: { path: [":id", "edit"], params: { id: int } }
});
```

---

## Option 2: **react-router-typesafe-routes** (Best for React Router 6+)

Specifically designed for React Router. Requires TypeScript 5.0+ and has Zod integration.

```bash
npm install react-router-typesafe-routes
```

---

## Option 3: **No library — use React Router's built-in helpers**

Since your usage is simple, you could replace it with plain TypeScript:

```typescript
// Simple typed route builders without dependencies
export const editFormRoute = (id: number) => `${id}/edit`;
export const viewFormRoute = (id: number) => `${id}/view`;
export const getCoreModuleRoute = (moduleName: CoreModule) => `/${moduleName}`;
```

React Router 6's `useParams()` can be typed with generics, and you can use Zod for parsing if needed.

---

## My Recommendation

Given your simple usage (mostly just building URL strings with typed params), I'd suggest:

1. **First choice**: Upgrade `typesafe-routes` to v12 — minimal code changes
2. **Second choice**: Remove it entirely and use plain TypeScript helper functions — you're not using many advanced features

Would you like me to help you with either approach?

---

Now I have a complete picture. Your usage is simple and can be easily replaced with **React Router's built-in `useParams()` hook** + plain TypeScript helpers. Here's the migration plan:

## Migration Summary

You're using `typesafe-routes` for two things:
1. **`useRouteParams(route)`** → Replace with React Router's `useParams<T>()`
2. **Route path builders** (`getViewFormRoute`, `getEditFormRoute`, etc.) → Replace with simple TypeScript functions

## Files to Update

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/lib/router/index.ts` | Remove typesafe-routes, keep simple helpers |
| `src/features/module-loader/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/components/app-layout/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/components/data-management/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/features/orders/view/details/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/features/orders/edit/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/features/contacts/view/details/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/features/contacts/view/logs/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/features/contacts/edit/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/features/accounts/edit/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |

## New Router Code

The new `src/lib/router/index.ts` would look like:

```typescript
// No external dependencies needed

export const enum CoreModule {
  dashboard = "dashboard",
  contacts = "contacts",
  // ... same as before
}

// Simple type-safe route builders
export const getCoreModuleRoute = (moduleName: CoreModule) => `/${moduleName}`;
export const getEditFormRoute = (id: number) => `${id}/edit`;
export const getViewFormRoute = (id: number) => `${id}/view`;
export const getAddFormRoute = () => "add";
export const getImportFormRoute = () => "import";

export const rootRoute = "/";
export const defaultModuleRoute = "/content";

// Type for useParams - use with React Router's useParams<RouteParams>()
export interface ModuleRouteParams {
  moduleName: CoreModule;
}

export interface IdRouteParams {
  id: string; // useParams always returns strings
}
```

## Component Usage

```typescript
// Before (typesafe-routes)
import { useRouteParams } from "typesafe-routes";
import { editFormRoute } from "@lib/router";
const { id } = useRouteParams(editFormRoute);

// After (React Router native)
import { useParams } from "react-router-dom";
import { IdRouteParams } from "@lib/router";
const { id } = useParams<IdRouteParams>();
const numericId = Number(id); // Parse to number when needed
```

---

1. Remove the `typesafe-routes` dependency
2. Update `src/lib/router/index.ts` with plain TypeScript
3. Update all 10 files to use React Router's native `useParams()`

## Summary

**Removed `typesafe-routes` dependency** and replaced with React Router's native `useParams()` hook.

| `src/lib/router/index.ts` | Removed all typesafe-routes imports; kept simple route builder functions |
| `src/features/module-loader/index.tsx` | `useRouteParams(coreModuleRoute)` → `useParams<{ moduleName: string }>()` |
| `src/components/app-layout/index.tsx` | Same pattern |
| `src/components/data-management/index.tsx` | Same pattern |
| `src/features/orders/view/details/index.tsx` | `useRouteParams(viewFormRoute)` → `useParams<{ id: string }>()` + `Number(idParam)` |
| `src/features/orders/edit/index.tsx` | Same pattern |
| `src/features/contacts/view/details/index.tsx` | Same pattern |
| `src/features/contacts/view/logs/index.tsx` | Same pattern |
| `src/features/contacts/edit/index.tsx` | Same pattern |
| `src/features/accounts/edit/index.tsx` | Same pattern |
| `package.json` | Removed `typesafe-routes` from dependencies |

Run these commands to do a clean install:

```bash
rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
```

This will:
1. Remove the old `node_modules` folder
2. Remove the stale `package-lock.json` 
3. Generate a fresh `package-lock.json` without `typesafe-routes`

```tsx
<Routes>
  <Route path="/auth/*" element={<Auth />} />
  <Route
    path={rootRoute}  // This is "/"
    element={<AppLayoutWithAutoBreadcrumbs>...</AppLayoutWithAutoBreadcrumbs>}

    <Route
      path={`${getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.dashboard)}/*`}  // This is "/dashboard/*"
      element={<ModuleLoader />}
    />
  </Route>
</Routes>
```

The problem is that:
1. Only `/dashboard/*` route is defined
2. There's no route for `/:moduleName/*` to catch all other modules like `/content`

The original code probably had a dynamic route that matched all modules. I need to add a catch-all route for `/:moduleName/*`.

Let me check what `getCoreModuleRoute` returns and fix the routes.</details></think>

---

I found the issue. The `app.tsx` only has a route defined for `/dashboard/*`, but not for other modules like `/content`. The router needs a dynamic route pattern `/:moduleName/*` to match all modules.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The indentation looks off but the logic is correct now. The route `/:moduleName/*` will now match `/content`, `/contacts`, `/orders`, etc.

The fix is complete. The issue was that `app.tsx` only had a route for `/dashboard/*` but no catch-all route for other modules. Now with `/:moduleName/*`, all module routes will be matched.

Let me verify the fix is correct by summarizing what was changed.</details></think>

---

Fixed. The issue was that `app.tsx` only had a specific route for `/dashboard/*`, but no dynamic route to match other modules like `/content`, `/contacts`, etc.

I changed:

```tsx
// Before - only matched /dashboard/*
path={`${getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.dashboard)}/*`}

// After - matches any /:moduleName/* (e.g., /content/*, /contacts/*, etc.)
path="/:moduleName/*"
```

Now when you navigate to `/content`, the `/:moduleName/*` route will match, and `useParams()` will return `{ moduleName: "content" }`, which will render the `ContentModule`.

Refresh your browser to test the fix.

        "contents": "export const ModuleLoader = () =&gt; {\n  const { moduleName } = useParams&lt;{ moduleName: string }&gt;();\n\n  return (\n    &lt;ModuleWrapperProvider&gt;\n      &lt;ErrorBoundary FallbackComponent={ErrorBoundaryFallbackPage} resetKeys={[moduleName]}&gt;\n        &lt;Suspense fallback=\"Loading...\"&gt;\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.content &amp;&amp; &lt;ContentModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.contacts &amp;&amp; &lt;ContactsModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.unsubscribes &amp;&amp; &lt;UnsubscribesModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.links &amp;&amp; &lt;LinksModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.comments &amp;&amp; &lt;CommentsModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.accounts &amp;&amp; &lt;AccountsModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.orders &amp;&amp; &lt;OrdersModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.domains &amp;&amp; &lt;DomainsModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.segments &amp;&amp; &lt;SegmentsModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.users &amp;&amp; &lt;UserModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.about &amp;&amp; &lt;AboutModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.emailTemplates &amp;&amp; &lt;EmailTemplatesModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.activityLogs &amp;&amp; &lt;ActivityLogModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.dashboard &amp;&amp; &lt;DashboardModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.media &amp;&amp; &lt;MediaModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.settings &amp;&amp; &lt;SettingsModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.tasks &amp;&amp; &lt;TasksModule /&gt;}\n          {!moduleName &amp;&amp; &lt;Navigate to={defaultModuleRoute} replace /&gt;}\n        &lt;/Suspense&gt;\n      &lt;/ErrorBoundary&gt;\n    &lt;/ModuleWrapperProvider&gt;\n  );\n};",

        "contents": "export const AccountViewBase = () =&gt; {\n  const { state } = useLocation();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const params = useParams();\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n\n  const [tabValue, setTabValue] = useState(\"details\");\n  const [account, setAccount] = useState&lt;AccountDetailsDto | null&gt;(\n    (state as AccountDetailsDto) || null\n  );\n  const didFetchRef = useRef(false);\n\n  const accountIdFromRoute = params.id ? Number(params.id) : undefined;\n  const accountId = useMemo(() =&gt; {\n    if (Number.isFinite(accountIdFromRoute)) return accountIdFromRoute as number;\n    if (account?.id &amp;&amp; Number.isFinite(account.id)) return account.id;\n    return undefined;\n  }, [account?.id, accountIdFromRoute]);\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    const load = async () =&gt; {\n      if (account || didFetchRef.current) return;\n      const id = params.id ? Number(params.id) : undefined;\n      if (!id) return;\n      try {\n        // First, try cache to avoid duplicate fetches across remounts\n        const cached = accountDetailsCache.get(id);\n        if (cached) {\n          setAccount(cached);\n          return;\n        }\n        didFetchRef.current = true;\n        const { data } = await client.api.accountsDetail(id);\n        accountDetailsCache.set(id, data);\n        setAccount(data);\n      } catch (e) {\n        // noop; fall back to minimal header\n        console.log(e);\n      }\n    };\n    load();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [params.id]);\n\n  const handleChange = (event: React.SyntheticEvent, newValue: string) =&gt; {\n    setTabValue(newValue);\n    navigate(newValue, { state: account ?? state });\n  };\n\n  const accountName = account?.name || \"View Account\";\n\n  const actionButtons = accountId ? (\n    &lt;DataManagementBlock\n;\n;",

        "contents": "// Simple type-safe route builders\nexport const getCoreModuleRoute = (moduleName: CoreModuleType) =&gt; &#96;/${moduleName}&#96;;\n\nexport const getEditFormRoute = (id: number) =&gt; &#96;${id}/edit&#96;;",

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "const METADATA_COLLAPSED_STORAGE_KEY = \"content-metadata-collapsed\";\n\nexport const ContentEdit = (props: ContentEditProps) =&gt; {\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const location = useLocation();\n  const { config } = useConfig();\n  const userInfo = useUserInfo();\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n  const { selectedLanguage } = useGlobalLanguageFilter();\n  const { setFullWidth } = useLayout();\n\n  // Set full width layout for content editor\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    setFullWidth(true);\n    return () =&gt; {\n      setFullWidth(false);\n    };\n  }, [setFullWidth]);\n\n  // Route parameters\n  const {\n    id,\n    sourceId: routeSourceId,\n    targetLanguage: routeTargetLanguage,\n    type: routeType,\n  } = useParams();\n  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();\n\n  // Support both route params (new) and query params (legacy)\n  const sourceId = routeSourceId || searchParams.get(\"sourceId\");\n  const translateToParam = routeTargetLanguage || searchParams.get(\"translateTo\");\n  const translationTypeParam =\n    (routeType as TranslationType) || (searchParams.get(\"type\") as TranslationType | null);\n\n  // Determine operation modes\n  const aiGeneratedContent = location.state?.aiGeneratedContent;\n  const isAIDraftRoute = location.pathname.includes(\"/ai-draft\");\n  const isAIDraftMode = !!aiGeneratedContent || isAIDraftRoute;\n  const isDuplicateMode = !!sourceId &amp;&amp; !translateToParam;\n  const isTranslationMode = !!translateToParam;\n  const isCreateMode = !id &amp;&amp; !isDuplicateMode &amp;&amp; !isTranslationMode &amp;&amp; !isAIDraftMode;\n\n  // UI state\n  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState&lt;string&gt;(\"content\");\n  const [restoreDataState, setRestoreDataState] = useState&lt;ContentEditRestoreState&gt;(\n    ContentEditRestoreState.Idle\n  );\n  const [storedMetadataCollapsed, setStoredMetadataCollapsed] = useLocalStorage(\n    METADATA_COLLAPSED_STORAGE_KEY,\n    false\n  );\n  const [localMetadataCollapsed, setLocalMetadataCollapsed] = useState(false);\n\n  // Dialog states\n  const [translateDialogOpen, setTranslateDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n;",

        "contents": "import { Route, Routes } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ContentEdit } from \"./content-edit\";\n\nexport const ContentModule = () =&gt; {\n  return (\n    &lt;Routes&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/\"} element={&lt;ContentList /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/new\"} element={&lt;ContentEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/ai-draft\"} element={&lt;ContentEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/:sourceId/duplicate\"} element={&lt;ContentEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/:sourceId/translate/:targetLanguage/:type\"} element={&lt;ContentEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/:sourceId/translate/:targetLanguage\"} element={&lt;ContentEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/:id/edit\"} element={&lt;ContentEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n    &lt;/Routes&gt;\n  );\n};",

        "contents": "export const DomainsModule = \nconst viewFormProps: GenericFormProps&lt;DomainDetailsDto, DomainCreateDto, DomainUpdateDto&gt; = {\n() =&gt; {\n\n    },\n  };\n\n  const editFormProps: GenericFormProps&lt;DomainDetailsDto, DomainCreateDto, DomainUpdateDto&gt; = {\n    ...formProps,\n    mode: \"update\",\n    editable: true,\n    getItemId: () =&gt; {\n      const params = useParams();\n      return Number(params &amp;&amp; params[\"*\"] &amp;&amp; params[\"*\"].match(/^(\\d+)\\/edit$/)?.[1]);\n    },\n    onSaved: () =&gt; {\n      navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.domains));\n    },\n  };\n\n  const createFormProps: GenericFormProps&lt;DomainDetailsDto, DomainCreateDto, DomainUpdateDto&gt; = {\n    ...formProps,\n    mode: \"create\",\n    editable: true,\n    onSaved: () =&gt; {\n      navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.domains));\n    },\n  };\n\n  const domainCreateForm = createFormProps &amp;&amp; DomainForm(\"create\", \"Create\", createFormProps);\n  const domainEditForm = editFormProps &amp;&amp; DomainForm(\"edit\", \"Edit\", editFormProps);\n  const domainViewForm = viewFormProps &amp;&amp; DomainForm(\"view\", \"View\", viewFormProps);\n\n  return (\n    &lt;&gt;\n      &lt;Routes&gt;\n        &lt;Route index element={&lt;DomainsLazy /&gt;} /&gt;\n        &lt;Route path={editFormRoute.template} element={domainEditForm} /&gt;\n        &lt;Route path={viewFormRoute.template} element={domainViewForm} /&gt;\n        &lt;Route path={addFormRoute.template} element={domainCreateForm} /&gt;\n      &lt;/Routes&gt;\n      &lt;Outlet /&gt;\n    &lt;/&gt;\n  );\n};",

        "contents": "import {\n  GenericDataGridProps,\n  GenericFormProps,\n  GenericModule,\n  getSchemaDto,\n} from \"@components/generic-components\";\nimport { CoreModule, getCoreModuleRoute, getEditFormRoute, getViewFormRoute } from \"@lib/router\";\nimport { useNavigate, useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\n\nimport swaggerJson from \"@lib/network/swagger.json\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";\nimport { LinkCreateDto, LinkDetailsDto, LinkUpdateDto } from \"@lib/network/swagger-client\";\n\nexport const LinksModule = () =&gt; {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n\n  const formProps: GenericFormProps&lt;LinkDetailsDto, LinkCreateDto, LinkUpdateDto&gt; = {\n    detailsSchema: getSchemaDto(\"LinkDetailsDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    updateSchema: getSchemaDto(\"LinkUpdateDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    createSchema: getSchemaDto(\"LinkCreateDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    editable: false,\n    getItemFn: client.api.linksDetail,\n    updateItemFn: client.api.linksPartialUpdate,\n    createItemFn: client.api.linksCreate,\n    getItemId: () =&gt; undefined,\n  };\n\n  const tableProps: GenericDataGridProps&lt;LinkDetailsDto&gt; = {\n    key: \"links-table\",\n    initiallyShownColumns: [\"name\", \"source\", \"destination\"],\n    schema: getSchemaDto(\"LinkDetailsDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    getItemsFn: client.api.linksList,\n    detailsNavigate: (item) =&gt; {\n      item.id &amp;&amp; navigate(getViewFormRoute(item.id), { state: item });\n    },\n    editNavigate: (item) =&gt; {\n      item.id &amp;&amp; navigate(getEditFormRoute(item.id), { state: item });\n    },\n  };\n\n  const deleteProps = {\n    header: \"Data Management\",\n    description: \"Please be aware that what has been deleted can never be brought back.\",\n    entity: \"link\",\n    listRoute: CoreModule.links,\n    deleteItemFn: client.api.linksDelete,\n  };\n\n  const module = GenericModule({\n    moduleName: \"Links\",\n;\n;",

        "contents": "export const LinksModule = \n\n\n  const module = GenericModule({\n    moduleName: \"Links\",\n    modulePath: CoreModule.links,\n    addButtonContent: \"Add link\",\n    tableProps: tableProps,\n    extraActions: {\n      export: {\n        showButton: true,\n        exportItemsFn: client.api.linksExportList,\n      },\n      import: {\n        showButton: true,\n        importItemsFn: client.api.linksImportCreate,\n        importSchema: getSchemaDto(\"LinkImportDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n      },\n      showColumnsPanel: true,\n      showFiltersPanel: true,\n    },\n    viewFormProps: {\n      ...formProps,\n      mode: \"details\",\n      editable: false,\n      deleteOptionProps: deleteProps,\n      getItemId: () =&gt; {\n        const params = useParams();\n        return Number(params &amp;&amp; params[\"*\"] &amp;&amp; params[\"*\"].match(/^(\\d+)\\/view$/)?.[1]);\n      },\n    },\n    editFormProps: {\n      ...formProps,\n      mode: \"update\",\n      editable: true,\n      getItemId: () =&gt; {\n        const params = useParams();\n        return Number(params &amp;&amp; params[\"*\"] &amp;&amp; params[\"*\"].match(/^(\\d+)\\/edit$/)?.[1]);\n      },\n      onSaved: () =&gt; {\n        navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.links));\n      },\n    },\n    createFormProps: {\n      ...formProps,\n      mode: \"create\",\n      editable: true,\n      onSaved: () =&gt; {\n        navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.links));\n      },\n    },\n  });\n\n  return module;\n};",

        "contents": "export function GenericModule&lt;TView extends BasicTypeForGeneric, TCreate, TUpdate&gt;({\n  moduleName,\n  modulePath,\n  addButtonContent,\n  tableProps,\n  createFormProps,\n  editFormProps,\n  viewFormProps,\n  extraActions,\n}: GenericModuleProps&lt;TView, TCreate, TUpdate&gt;): JSX.Element {\n\n  const genericViewForm = viewFormProps &amp;&amp; getForm(\"view\", \"View\", viewFormProps);\n\n  return (\n    &lt;&gt;\n      &lt;Routes&gt;\n        &lt;Route index element={genericTable} /&gt;\n        &lt;Route path={getAddFormRoute()} element={genericCreateForm} /&gt;\n        &lt;Route path={getEditFormRoute(1)} element={genericEditForm} /&gt;\n        &lt;Route path={getViewFormRoute(1)} element={genericViewForm} /&gt;\n      &lt;/Routes&gt;\n      &lt;Outlet /&gt;\n    &lt;/&gt;\n  );\n}",

        "contents": "import Alert from \"@mui/material/Alert\";\nimport Box from \"@mui/material/Box\";\nimport CircularProgress from \"@mui/material/CircularProgress\";\nimport { useNavigate, useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ModuleWrapper } from \"@components/module-wrapper\";\nimport { SegmentsBreadcrumbLinks } from \"../constants\";\nimport { SegmentCreateDto, SegmentDetailsDto, SegmentUpdateDto } from \"lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"providers/request-provider\";\nimport { CoreModule, getCoreModuleRoute, getViewFormRoute } from \"lib/router\";\nimport { SegmentForm } from \"./segment-form\";\n\nexport const SegmentEdit = () =&gt; {\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const { id } = useParams&lt;{ id: string }&gt;();\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n\n  const [segment, setSegment] = useState&lt;SegmentDetailsDto | null&gt;(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    const loadSegment = async () =&gt; {\n      if (!id) return;\n\n      try {\n        const result = await client.api.segmentsDetail(Number(id));\n        setSegment(result.data);\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"Failed to load segment:\", error);\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    loadSegment();\n  }, [id, client]);\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      &lt;ModuleWrapper breadcrumbs={SegmentsBreadcrumbLinks} currentBreadcrumb=\"Edit Segment\"&gt;\n        &lt;Box sx={{ display: \"flex\", justifyContent: \"center\", py: 4 }}&gt;\n          &lt;CircularProgress /&gt;\n        &lt;/Box&gt;\n      &lt;/ModuleWrapper&gt;\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!segment) {\n    return (\n      &lt;ModuleWrapper breadcrumbs={SegmentsBreadcrumbLinks} currentBreadcrumb=\"Edit Segment\"&gt;\n        &lt;Alert severity=\"error\"&gt;Segment not found&lt;/Alert&gt;\n      &lt;/ModuleWrapper&gt;\n    );\n  }\n\n  const handleSave = async (payload: SegmentCreateDto | SegmentUpdateDto) =&gt; {\n    await client.api.segmentsPartialUpdate(segment.id!, payload as SegmentUpdateDto);\n  };\n\n  const viewRoute = getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.segments) + \"/\" +;\n;",

        "contents": "import {\n  GenericDataGridProps,\n  GenericFormProps,\n  GenericModule,\n  getSchemaDto,\n} from \"@components/generic-components\";\nimport { CoreModule, getCoreModuleRoute, getEditFormRoute, getViewFormRoute } from \"@lib/router\";\nimport { useNavigate, useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\n\nimport swaggerJson from \"@lib/network/swagger.json\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";\nimport { UnsubscribeDto, UnsubscribeDetailsDto } from \"@lib/network/swagger-client\";\n\nexport const UnsubscribesModule = () =&gt; {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n\n  const formProps: GenericFormProps&lt;UnsubscribeDetailsDto, UnsubscribeDto, UnsubscribeDto&gt; = {\n    detailsSchema: getSchemaDto(\"UnsubscribeDetailsDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    updateSchema: getSchemaDto(\"UnsubscribeDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    createSchema: getSchemaDto(\"UnsubscribeDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    editable: false,\n    getItemFn: client.api.unsubscribesDetail,\n    updateItemFn: client.api.unsubscribesPartialUpdate,\n    createItemFn: client.api.unsubscribesCreate,\n    getItemId: () =&gt; undefined,\n  };\n\n  const tableProps: GenericDataGridProps&lt;UnsubscribeDetailsDto&gt; = {\n    key: \"unsubscribes-table\",\n    schema: getSchemaDto(\"UnsubscribeDetailsDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    getItemsFn: client.api.unsubscribesList,\n    detailsNavigate: (item) =&gt; {\n      item.id &amp;&amp; navigate(getViewFormRoute(item.id), { state: item });\n    },\n    editNavigate: (item) =&gt; {\n      item.id &amp;&amp; navigate(getEditFormRoute(item.id), { state: item });\n    },\n  };\n\n  const deleteProps = {\n    header: \"Data Management\",\n    description: \"Please be aware that what has been deleted can never be brought back.\",\n    entity: \"unsubscribe\",\n    listRoute: CoreModule.unsubscribes,\n    deleteItemFn: client.api.unsubscribesDelete,\n  };\n\n  const module = GenericModule({\n    moduleName: \"Unsubscribes\",\n;\n;",

        "contents": " \"@components/data-management\";\n\nexport const OrderView = () =&gt; {\n  const context = useRequestContext();\n  const { client } = context;\n  const { id: idParam } = useParams&lt;{ id: string }&gt;();\n  const id = Number(idParam);\n  const { notificationsService } = useNotificationsService();\n  const { setBusy } = useModuleWrapperContext();\n  const { Show: showErrorModal } = useErrorDetailsModal();\n\n  const [order, setOrder] = useState&lt;OrderDetailsDto | undefined&gt;();\n  const [contact, setContact] = useState&lt;ContactDetailsDto&gt;();\n  const [contactCountry, setContactCountry] = useState&lt;string&gt;(\"\");\n  const [orderItems, setOrderItems] = useState&lt;OrderItemDetailsDto[] | undefined&gt;();\n  const [isEdit, setIsEdit] = useState&lt;boolean&gt;(false);\n  const [orderItem, setOrderItem] = useState&lt;OrderItemDetailsDto&gt;();\n  const [openConfirmation, setOpenConfirmation] = useState(false);\n  const [isConfirmed, setIsConfirmed] = useState(false);\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    setBusy(async () =&gt; {\n      try {\n        const { data } = await client.api.ordersDetail(id);\n        setContactState(data.contactId);\n        setOrder(data);\n        setOrderItems(await getOrderItems(data.id!));\n      } catch (e) {\n        console.log(e);\n      }\n    });\n  }, [client]);\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    if (isConfirmed) {\n      (async () =&gt; {\n        await execDeleteWithToast(deleteRecord, notificationsService, \"order item\", showErrorModal);\n      })();\n    }\n  }, [isConfirmed]);\n\n  const deleteRecord = async () =&gt; {\n    await client.api.orderItemsDelete(orderItem!.id!);\n    setOrderItems(await getOrderItems(order!.id!));\n    setIsConfirmed(false);\n  };\n\n  const setContactState = async (id: number) =&gt; {\n    try {\n      const { data } = await client.api.contactsDetail(id);\n      setContact(data);\n      if (data.countryCode) {\n        setContactCountryState(data.countryCode);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.log(error);\n      notificationsService.error(\"Server error: could not retrieve contact details.\");\n    }\n  };\n\n  const setContactCountryState = async (code: string) =&gt;\n;\n;",

        "contents": "import { EmailTemplatesList } from \"./list\";\nimport { EmailTemplateEdit } from \"./edit\";\n\nexport const EmailTemplatesModule = () =&gt; {\n  return (\n    &lt;Routes&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/\"} element={&lt;EmailTemplatesList /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/:id/view\"} element={&lt;EmailTemplateEdit readonly /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/:id/edit\"} element={&lt;EmailTemplateEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/add\"} element={&lt;EmailTemplateEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n    &lt;/Routes&gt;\n  );\n};",

        "contents": "\"use client\";\nimport { Suspense } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { CoreModule, defaultModuleRoute } from \"lib/router\";\nimport { ModuleWrapperProvider } from \"@providers/module-wrapper-provider\";\nimport { Navigate } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ErrorBoundary } from \"react-error-boundary\";\nimport { ErrorBoundaryFallbackPage } from \"@components/error-boundary-fallback-page\";\nimport { ContentModule } from \"@features/content/lazy\";\nimport { DashboardModule } from \"@features/dashboard/lazy\";\nimport { ContactsModule } from \"@features/contacts/lazy\";\nimport { AccountsModule } from \"@features/accounts/lazy\";\nimport { OrdersModule } from \"@features/orders/lazy\";\nimport { DomainsModule } from \"@features/domains/lazy\";\nimport { LinksModule } from \"@features/links/lazy\";\nimport { CommentsModule } from \"@features/comments/lazy\";\nimport { UnsubscribesModule } from \"@features/unsubscribes/lazy\";\nimport { UserModule } from \"@features/users/lazy\";\nimport { AboutModule } from \"@features/about/lazy\";\nimport { SegmentsModule } from \"@features/segments/lazy\";\nimport { EmailTemplatesModule } from \"@features/email-templates/lazy\";\nimport { ActivityLogModule } from \"@features/activity-log/lazy\";\nimport { MediaModule } from \"@features/media/lazy\";\nimport { SettingsModule } from \"@features/settings/lazy\";\nimport { TasksModule } from \"@features/tasks\";\n\nexport const ModuleLoader = () =&gt; {\n  const { moduleName } = useParams;\n;",

        "contents": "export const UnsubscribesModule = \n\n\n  const module = GenericModule({\n    moduleName: \"Unsubscribes\",\n    modulePath: CoreModule.unsubscribes,\n    tableProps: tableProps,\n    extraActions: {\n      export: {\n        showButton: true,\n        exportItemsFn: client.api.unsubscribesExportList,\n      },\n      import: {\n        showButton: true,\n        importItemsFn: client.api.unsubscribesImportCreate,\n        importSchema: getSchemaDto(\"UnsubscribeImportDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n      },\n      showColumnsPanel: true,\n      showFiltersPanel: true,\n    },\n    viewFormProps: {\n      ...formProps,\n      mode: \"details\",\n      editable: false,\n      deleteOptionProps: deleteProps,\n      getItemId: () =&gt; {\n        const params = useParams();\n        return Number(params &amp;&amp; params[\"*\"] &amp;&amp; params[\"*\"].match(/^(\\d+)\\/view$/)?.[1]);\n      },\n    },\n    editFormProps: {\n      ...formProps,\n      mode: \"update\",\n      editable: true,\n      getItemId: () =&gt; {\n        const params = useParams();\n        return Number(params &amp;&amp; params[\"*\"] &amp;&amp; params[\"*\"].match(/^(\\d+)\\/edit$/)?.[1]);\n      },\n      onSaved: () =&gt; {\n        navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.unsubscribes));\n      },\n    },\n    createFormProps: {\n      ...formProps,\n      mode: \"create\",\n      editable: true,\n      onSaved: () =&gt; {\n        navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.unsubscribes));\n      },\n    },\n  });\n\n  return module;\n};",

            "text": "        return Number(params &amp;&amp; params[\"*\"] &amp;&amp; params[\"*\"].match(/^(\\d+)\\/edit$/)?.[1]);",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },

            "text": "      },",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "      onSaved: () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "        navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.unsubscribes));",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "      },",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "    },",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "      ...formProps,",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "      mode: \"create\",",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "      editable: true,",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "      onSaved: () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "        navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.unsubscribes));",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "      },",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "    },",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "  });",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "  return module;",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 99
          }
        ]

    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "range": {

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 36,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "contents": "import { ContactDetailsDto, ContactUpdateDto } from \"lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"providers/request-provider\";\nimport { useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ContactForm } from \"../form\";\n\nexport const ContactEdit = () =&gt; {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n\n  const { id: idParam } = useParams&lt;{ id: string }&gt;();\n  const id = Number(idParam);\n\n  const [contact, setContact] = useState&lt;ContactDetailsDto&gt;({\n    firstName: \"\",\n    email: \"\",\n  });\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    (async () =&gt; {\n      try {\n        const { data } = await client.api.contactsDetail(id);\n        setContact(data);\n      } catch (e) {\n        console.log(e);\n      }\n    })();\n  }, [client]);\n\n  const handleSave = async (newContact: ContactDetailsDto) =&gt; {\n    const updateDto: ContactUpdateDto = {\n      ...newContact,\n    };\n    await client.api.contactsPartialUpdate(id, updateDto);\n  };\n\n  return &lt;ContactForm contact={contact} handleSave={handleSave} isEdit={true} /&gt;;\n};",
        "signatures": {},

        "contents": "import { OrderDetailsDto, OrderUpdateDto } from \"lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"providers/request-provider\";\nimport { OrderForm } from \"../form\";\nimport { useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\n\nexport const OrderEdit = () =&gt; {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n\n  const { id: idParam } = useParams&lt;{ id: string }&gt;();\n  const id = Number(idParam);\n\n  const [order, setOrder] = useState&lt;OrderDetailsDto&gt;();\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    (async () =&gt; {\n      try {\n        const { data } = await client.api.ordersDetail(id);\n        setOrder(data);\n      } catch (e) {\n        console.log(e);\n      }\n    })();\n  }, [client]);\n\n  const handleSave = async (newOrder: OrderDetailsDto) =&gt; {\n    const updateDto: OrderUpdateDto = {\n      ...newOrder!,\n    };\n    await client.api.ordersPartialUpdate(id, updateDto!);\n  };\n\n  return &lt;OrderForm order={order} updateOrder={setOrder} handleSave={handleSave} isEdit={true} /&gt;;\n};",
        "signatures": {},

    {

            "line": 21,

          }
        },
        "contents": "export const CoreModule = {\n  dashboard: \"dashboard\",\n  contacts: \"contacts\",\n  links: \"links\",\n  comments: \"comments\",\n  content: \"content\",\n  media: \"media\",\n  accounts: \"accounts\",\n  orders: \"orders\",\n  deals: \"deals\",\n  domains: \"domains\",\n  segments: \"segments\",\n  unsubscribes: \"unsubscribes\",\n  users: \"users\",\n  about: \"about\",\n  emailTemplates: \"email-templates\",\n  activityLogs: \"activity-logs\",\n  settings: \"settings\",\n  tasks: \"tasks\",\n} as const;\n\nexport type CoreModuleType = typeof CoreModule[keyof typeof CoreModule];",

      "codeBlock": {

            "line": 31,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "contents": "import {\n  addFormRoute,\n  detailsRoute,\n  contactLogsRoute,\n  editFormRoute,\n  viewFormRoute,\n} from \"lib/router\";\nimport { Outlet, Route, Routes } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ContactAdd } from \"./add\";\nimport { ContactEdit } from \"./edit\";\nimport { ContactsLazy } from \"./lazy\";\nimport { ContactView } from \"./view/details\";\nimport { ContactBase } from \"./view\";\nimport { ContactLogs } from \"./view/logs\";\n\nexport const ContactsModule = () =&gt; {\n  return (\n    &lt;&gt;\n      &lt;Routes&gt;\n        &lt;Route index element={&lt;ContactsLazy /&gt;} /&gt;\n        &lt;Route path={editFormRoute.template} element={&lt;ContactEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n        &lt;Route path={viewFormRoute.template} element={&lt;ContactBase /&gt;}&gt;\n          &lt;Route index element={&lt;ContactView /&gt;} /&gt;\n          &lt;Route path={detailsRoute.template} element={&lt;ContactView /&gt;} /&gt;\n          &lt;Route path={contactLogsRoute.template} element={&lt;ContactLogs /&gt;} /&gt;\n        &lt;/Route&gt;\n        &lt;Route path={addFormRoute.template} element={&lt;ContactAdd /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;/Routes&gt;\n      &lt;Outlet /&gt;\n    &lt;/&gt;\n  );\n};",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "import {",

            "lineNumber": 10

            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "        &lt;Route path={editFormRoute.template} element={&lt;ContactEdit /&gt;} /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "        &lt;Route path={viewFormRoute.template} element={&lt;ContactBase /&gt;}&gt;",

            "lineNumber": 24
          },

          },

        "contents": "export const App = \n\n\n  return (\n    &lt;LocalizationProvider dateAdapter={AdapterDayjs}&gt;\n      &lt;ConfigProvider&gt;\n        &lt;GlobalLanguageFilterProvider&gt;\n          &lt;TranslationDraftProvider&gt;\n            &lt;LayoutProvider&gt;\n              &lt;ThemeProvider&gt;\n                &lt;AuthProvider&gt;\n                  &lt;RequestProvider&gt;\n                    &lt;ToastContainer position=\"top-right\" style={{ marginTop: \"60px\" }} /&gt;\n                    &lt;UserProvider&gt;\n                      &lt;ErrorDetailsModalProvider&gt;\n                        &lt;BrowserRouter\n                          future={{\n                            v7_startTransition: true,\n                            v7_relativeSplatPath: true,\n                          }}\n                        &gt;\n                          &lt;Routes&gt;\n                            &lt;Route path=\"/auth/*\" element={&lt;Auth /&gt;} /&gt;\n                            &lt;Route\n                              path={rootRoute}\n                              element={\n                                &lt;AppLayoutWithAutoBreadcrumbs&gt;\n                                  &lt;Outlet /&gt;\n                                &lt;/AppLayoutWithAutoBreadcrumbs&gt;\n                              }\n                            &gt;\n                              &lt;Route path={rootRoute} element={&lt;ModuleLoader /&gt;} /&gt;\n&lt;Route\n                              path=\"/:moduleName/*\"\n                              element={&lt;ModuleLoader /&gt;}\n                            /&gt;\n                            &lt;/Route&gt;\n                          &lt;/Routes&gt;\n                        &lt;/BrowserRouter&gt;\n                      &lt;/ErrorDetailsModalProvider&gt;\n                    &lt;/UserProvider&gt;\n                  &lt;/RequestProvider&gt;\n                &lt;/AuthProvider&gt;\n              &lt;/ThemeProvider&gt;\n            &lt;/LayoutProvider&gt;\n          &lt;/TranslationDraftProvider&gt;\n        &lt;/GlobalLanguageFilterProvider&gt;\n      &lt;/ConfigProvider&gt;\n    &lt;/LocalizationProvider&gt;\n  );\n};",

        "contents": "import { AccountDetailsDto, AccountUpdateDto } from \"lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"providers/request-provider\";\nimport { AccountForm } from \"../form\";\nimport { useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\n\nexport const AccountEdit = () =&gt; {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n\n  const { id: idParam } = useParams&lt;{ id: string }&gt;();\n  const id = Number(idParam);\n\n  const [account, setAccount] = useState&lt;AccountDetailsDto&gt;({ name: \"\" });\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    (async () =&gt; {\n      try {\n        const { data } = await client.api.accountsDetail(id);\n        setAccount(data);\n      } catch (e) {\n        console.log(e);\n      }\n    })();\n  }, [client]);\n\n  const handleSave = async (newAccount: AccountDetailsDto) =&gt; {\n    const updateDto: AccountUpdateDto = {\n      ...newAccount,\n    };\n    await client.api.accountsPartialUpdate(id, updateDto!);\n  };\n\n  return &lt;AccountForm account={account} handleSave={handleSave} isEdit={true} /&gt;;\n};",

---


Types are consistent. Summary of changes:

## Summary of Changes

### 1. Centralized route parameter types (`src/lib/router/index.ts`)
- Added `ModuleRouteParams` for routes with `moduleName`
- Added `IdRouteParams` for routes with `id`
- Added `ModuleWithIdRouteParams` for routes with both
- Types use `Record`-compatible structure for React Router compatibility

### 2. Updated all files to use centralized types
- `src/features/module-loader/index.tsx` - Uses `ModuleRouteParams`
- `src/components/app-layout/index.tsx` - Uses `ModuleRouteParams`
- `src/components/data-management/index.tsx` - Uses `ModuleRouteParams`
- `src/features/orders/view/details/index.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`
- `src/features/orders/edit/index.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`
- `src/features/contacts/view/details/index.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`
- `src/features/contacts/view/logs/index.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`
- `src/features/contacts/edit/index.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`
- `src/features/accounts/edit/index.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`
- `src/features/segments/view/details/index.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`
- `src/features/segments/form/edit.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`

### 3. Fixed type issues
- Fixed `buildMenuItems` return type to properly filter out nulls
- Exported `SidebarMenuSection` from `build-menu-items.ts` for reuse
- Updated `Sidebar` component to import the shared type

### 4. Code structure improvements
- No duplicate type definitions
- Centralized route param types in one location
- Consistent typing across the codebase
- Type-safe route parameter handling

All linter errors are resolved, and the codebase now uses a consistent, maintainable type system.

---


Updated the route functions to return route templates when no ID is provided.

## Changes Made

**`src/lib/router/index.ts`**:
- `getEditFormRoute(id?: number)`:
  - With ID: returns `"123/edit"` (actual path for navigation)
  - Without ID: returns `":id/edit"` (route template for React Router)
- `getViewFormRoute(id?: number)`:
  - With ID: returns `"123/view"` (actual path for navigation)
  - Without ID: returns `":id/view"` (route template for React Router)

This allows:
1. Route definitions: `<Route path={getEditFormRoute()} />` → matches `/:id/edit`
2. Navigation: `navigate(getEditFormRoute(123))` → navigates to `/123/edit`

The `:id` parameter is now generic and works in both contexts. No linter errors found.

The React DevTools message is informational and appears in development. It’s not an error and isn’t related to the routing changes.

**What it means:**
- React suggests installing React DevTools for debugging
- It’s a development-only message
- It doesn’t affect functionality

**If you want to reduce it:**
1. Install React DevTools (Chrome/Firefox extension) — the message will stop
2. Or ignore it — it’s harmless

**To verify routing is working:**
- Routes should match correctly
- Navigation should work
- No console errors related to routing

If you see actual errors (not just this message), share the details and I can help debug. The routing code looks correct with no linter errors.

Is routing working as expected, or are you seeing specific issues beyond this message?

---


All files have been updated. Summary of changes:

## Fixed Files

Updated 5 module files that were using the old typesafe-routes API:

1. **`src/features/segments/segments-module.tsx`**
   - Changed `addFormRoute.template` → `getAddFormRoute()`
   - Changed `editFormRoute.template` → `getEditFormRoute()`
   - Changed `viewFormRoute.template` → `getViewFormRoute()`

2. **`src/features/orders/orders-module.tsx`**
   - Updated all route references
   - Changed `detailsRoute.template` → `"details"` (static route)

3. **`src/features/domains/domains-module.tsx`**
   - Updated all route references to use functions

4. **`src/features/contacts/contacts-module.tsx`**
   - Updated all route references
   - Changed `detailsRoute.template` → `"details"`
   - Changed `contactLogsRoute.template` → `"logs"`

5. **`src/features/accounts/accounts-module.tsx`**
   - Updated all route references
   - Changed `detailsRoute.template` → `"details"`

All files now use the new function-based API:
- `getAddFormRoute()` → returns `"add"` or `":id/add"` (when no ID)
- `getEditFormRoute()` → returns `":id/edit"` (route template)
- `getViewFormRoute()` → returns `":id/view"` (route template)

The error should be resolved. The app should work correctly now.

        "contents": "import { createTheme, ThemeProvider as MUIThemeProvider } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\nimport CssBaseline from \"@mui/material/CssBaseline\";\nimport { ThemeOptions } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\n\nexport const themeOptions: ThemeOptions = {\n  spacing: 4,\n  typography: {\n    fontFamily: \"'Inter', 'Roboto', 'Helvetica', 'Arial', sans-serif\",\n    h3: {\n      fontSize: \"36px\",\n      fontWeight: 600,\n      lineHeight: \"42px\",\n    },\n    subtitle1: {\n      fontSize: \"16px\",\n      fontWeight: 500,\n      lineHeight: \"20px\",\n    },\n    subtitle2: {\n      fontSize: \"12px\",\n      fontWeight: 600,\n      lineHeight: \"16px\",\n      color: \"#6B7280\",\n    },\n  },\n  palette: {\n    primary: {\n      main: \"#3878FF\",\n      light: \"#f0f4ff\",\n      dark: \"#2854B2\",\n    },\n    secondary: {\n      main: \"#0b0b0d\",\n      light: \"#f8faff\",\n      dark: \"#060A10\",\n    },\n    text: {\n      primary: \"#0b0b0d\",\n      secondary: \"#0b0b0ddb\",\n      disabled: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38)\",\n    },\n    info: {\n      main: \"#2196F3\",\n      light: \"#64B6F7\",\n      dark: \"#0B79D0\",\n         "contents": "import \"./styles.css\";\n\nconst MDXEditorNew = ({\n  value,\n  onChange,\n  isReadOnly,\n  contentDetails,\n  onContentChangeStatus,\n  livePreview,\n  livePreviewTemplate,\n  isMetadataCollapsed,\n  preloadedMdxComponents,\n  originalContentForDiff,\n  contentFormat,\n}: MDXEditorNewProps) =&gt; {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n  const { config } = useConfig();\n  const { notificationsService } = useNotificationsService();\n  const { Show: showErrorModal } = useErrorDetailsModal();\n  const [initialContent, setInitialContent] = useState&lt;string&gt;(\"\");\n  const [previewKey, setPreviewKey] = useState&lt;number&gt;(Date.now());\n  const [hasContentChanged, setHasContentChanged] = useState&lt;boolean&gt;(false);\n  const [componentsPanelOpen, setComponentsPanelOpen] = useState&lt;boolean&gt;(false);\n  // Track currently uploading image files by name\n  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n  const [uploadingImages, setUploadingImages] = useState&lt;Set&lt;string&gt;&gt;(new Set());\n  const [pendingChanges, setPendingChanges] = useState&lt;boolean&gt;(false);\n\n  // Fetch custom MDX components for the current content type\n  const { components: mdxComponents } = useMdxComponents({\n    contentType: contentDetails.type,\n    useCache: true,\n    maxCacheAgeHours: 1,\n    preloadedData: preloadedMdxComponents,\n  });\n\n  // Log available components for development\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    if (mdxComponents.length &gt; 0) {\n      console.log(\"Available MDX components for content type:\", contentDetails.type, mdxComponents);\n    }\n  }, [mdxComponents, contentDetails.type]);\n\n  // Store initial content for diff comparison when component mounts\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    if (initialContent === \"\" &amp;&amp; value) {\n      // Use original content for diff if provided (for AI editing), otherwise use current value\n      const diffBase = originalContentForDiff || value;\n      setInitialContent(diffBase);\n    }\n  }, [value, initialContent, originalContentForDiff]);\n\n  // Track content changes to determine when to switch to live preview\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/mdx-editor-new/components/mdx-components-panel.tsx",

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 261,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const MdxComponentsPanel: React.FC&lt;MdxComponentsPanelProps&gt; = ({\n  components,\n  onClosePanel,\n}) =&gt; {\n  if (components.length === 0) {\n    return (\n      &lt;Box sx={{ p: 2, textAlign: \"center\", color: \"text.secondary\" }}&gt;\n        &lt;Typography variant=\"body2\"&gt;\n          No custom components available for this content type\n        &lt;/Typography&gt;\n      &lt;/Box&gt;\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Box sx={{ p: 1 }}&gt;\n      {components.map((component) =&gt; {\n        const defaultMarkup = generateComponentMarkup(component);\n        const example =\n          component.examples &amp;&amp; component.examples.length &gt; 0 ? component.examples[0] : undefined;\n\n        return (\n          &lt;Accordion key={component.name} sx={{ mb: 1 }}&gt;\n            &lt;AccordionSummary expandIcon={&lt;ChevronDown size={16} /&gt;}&gt;\n              &lt;Box sx={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: 1, width: \"100%\" }}&gt;\n                &lt;Typography variant=\"subtitle2\"&gt;{component.name}&lt;/Typography&gt;\n                &lt;Box sx={{ flex: 1 }} /&gt;\n                {!!component.usageCount &amp;&amp; component.usageCount &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (\n                  &lt;Tooltip title=\"Approximate usage count across content\"&gt;\n                    &lt;Typography variant=\"caption\" color=\"text.secondary\"&gt;\n                      Used {component.usageCount} time(s)\n                    &lt;/Typography&gt;\n                  &lt;/Tooltip&gt;\n                )}\n              &lt;/Box&gt;\n            &lt;/AccordionSummary&gt;\n\n            &lt;AccordionDetails&gt;\n      }\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/features/about/index.tsx",
        "range": {

            "column": 2

        },
        "contents": "import Card from \"@mui/material/Card\";\nimport CardContent from \"@mui/material/CardContent\";\nimport CircularProgress from \"@mui/material/CircularProgress\";\nimport Typography from \"@mui/material/Typography\";\nimport Grid from \"@mui/material/Grid\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n\nexport const AboutModule = () =&gt; {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n  const [backendVersion, setBackendVersion] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    const getVersion = async () =&gt; {\n      const { data } = await client.api.versionList();\n      setBackendVersion(data.version || \"Unknown\");\n    };\n    getVersion();\n  });\n  return (\n    &lt;ModuleWrapper breadcrumbs={[]} currentBreadcrumb={\"About\"}&gt;\n      &lt;Grid container gap={5}&gt;\n        &lt;Grid size={{ xs: \"auto\" }}&gt;\n          &lt;Card sx={{ minWidth: 275 }}&gt;\n            &lt;CardContent&gt;\n              &lt;Typography&gt;Frontend Version: {process.env.VERSION}&lt;/Typography&gt;\n            &lt;/CardContent&gt;\n          &lt;/Card&gt;\n        &lt;/Grid&gt;\n        &lt;Grid size={{ xs: \"auto\" }}&gt;\n          &lt;Card sx={{ minWidth: 275 }}&gt;\n            &lt;CardContent&gt;\n              &lt;Typography&gt;\n                Backend version:\n                {backendVersion ? (\n                  backendVersion\n                ) : (\n                  &lt;CircularProgress size={\"0.8rem\"} sx={{ marginLeft: \"2rem\" }} /&gt;\n                )}\n              &lt;/Typography&gt;\n            &lt;/CardContent&gt;\n          &lt;/Card&gt;\n        &lt;/Grid&gt;\n      &lt;/Grid&gt;\n    &lt;/ModuleWrapper&gt;\n  );\n};",

        "contents": "import React from \"react\";\nimport Box from \"@mui/material/Box\";\nimport Typography from \"@mui/material/Typography\";\nimport Tooltip from \"@mui/material/Tooltip\";\nimport Accordion from \"@mui/material/Accordion\";\nimport AccordionSummary from \"@mui/material/AccordionSummary\";\nimport AccordionDetails from \"@mui/material/AccordionDetails\";\nimport Stack from \"@mui/material/Stack\";\nimport { ChevronDown, Copy } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { MdxComponentDto, MdxComponentPropertyDto } from \"@lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport { MdxCodeBlock } from \"./mdx-code-block\";\n\ninterface MdxComponentsPanelProps {\n  components: MdxComponentDto[];\n  onClosePanel?: () =&gt; void;\n}\n\n/**\n * Format a property value for proper JSX syntax\n * For booleans: returns null if false (to omit the attribute), true if true (for shorthand syntax)\n */",

            "line": 142,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const App = \n\n\n  return (\n    &lt;LocalizationProvider dateAdapter={AdapterDayjs}&gt;\n      &lt;ConfigProvider&gt;\n        &lt;GlobalLanguageFilterProvider&gt;\n          &lt;TranslationDraftProvider&gt;\n            &lt;LayoutProvider&gt;\n              &lt;ThemeProvider&gt;\n                &lt;AuthProvider&gt;\n                  &lt;RequestProvider&gt;\n                    &lt;ToastContainer position=\"top-right\" style={{ marginTop: \"60px\" }} /&gt;\n                    &lt;UserProvider&gt;\n                      &lt;ErrorDetailsModalProvider&gt;\n                        &lt;BrowserRouter\n                          future={{\n                            v7_startTransition: true,\n                            v7_relativeSplatPath: true,\n                          }}\n                        &gt;\n                          &lt;Routes&gt;\n                            &lt;Route path=\"/auth/*\" element={&lt;Auth /&gt;} /&gt;\n                            &lt;Route\n                              path={rootRoute}\n                              element={\n                                &lt;AppLayoutWithAutoBreadcrumbs&gt;\n                                  &lt;Outlet /&gt;\n                                &lt;/AppLayoutWithAutoBreadcrumbs&gt;\n                              }\n                            &gt;\n                              &lt;Route path={rootRoute} element={&lt;ModuleLoader /&gt;} /&gt;\n&lt;Route\n                              path=\"/:moduleName/*\"\n                              element={&lt;ModuleLoader /&gt;}\n                            /&gt;\n                            &lt;/Route&gt;\n                          &lt;/Routes&gt;\n                        &lt;/BrowserRouter&gt;\n                      &lt;/ErrorDetailsModalProvider&gt;\n                    &lt;/UserProvider&gt;\n                  &lt;/RequestProvider&gt;\n                &lt;/AuthProvider&gt;\n              &lt;/ThemeProvider&gt;\n            &lt;/LayoutProvider&gt;\n          &lt;/TranslationDraftProvider&gt;\n        &lt;/GlobalLanguageFilterProvider&gt;\n      &lt;/ConfigProvider&gt;\n    &lt;/LocalizationProvider&gt;\n  );\n};",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 20,
                "column": 1
              },

---


## Migration difficulty: Very high

### Current MUI usage
- 1,055 MUI references across 147 files
- Core dependencies:
  - `@mui/material` (core components)
  - `@mui/x-data-grid` (data tables)
  - `@mui/x-date-pickers` (date pickers)
  - `@emotion/react` & `@emotion/styled` (styling system)
- Custom theme with specific colors, typography, and component overrides

### Major challenges

1. DataGrid replacement
   - `@mui/x-data-grid` is heavily used
   - shadcn has no equivalent
   - Options: TanStack Table (more work) or keep MUI DataGrid

2. Styling system change
   - MUI uses Emotion
   - shadcn uses Tailwind CSS
   - Requires rewriting styled components and theme

3. Component mapping
   - Many MUI components need shadcn equivalents
   - Some features may be missing or require custom work

4. Date pickers
   - `@mui/x-date-pickers` is integrated
   - shadcn uses react-day-picker (different API)

5. Theme migration
   - Custom MUI theme needs conversion to Tailwind config
   - Component overrides need to be reimplemented

### Estimated effort
- Time: 3–6 months for a team
- Files to change: ~150+ files
- Risk: High (breaking changes, regressions)

### Recommendation

Option 1: Hybrid approach (recommended)
- Keep MUI DataGrid and DatePickers
- Migrate simpler components (buttons, cards, dialogs) to shadcn gradually
- Use Tailwind alongside Emotion during transition

Option 2: Full migration
- Only if you need shadcn’s design system
- Budget 3–6 months
- Consider a complete rewrite

Option 3: Stay with MUI
- MUI is mature and well-suited for admin panels
- Your current setup is working
- Consider MUI v6 when available

### If you proceed
1. Start with a small feature/module
2. Set up Tailwind CSS alongside Emotion
3. Create a component mapping document
4. Build wrapper components for gradual migration
5. Keep MUI DataGrid and DatePickers initially

Should I create a migration plan or help set up a hybrid approach?

        "contents": "export const DataTableContainer = styled(\"div\")&#96;\n  width: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  min-height: 400px;\n\n  .MuiDataGrid-root {\n    border: none;\n    width: 100%;\n  }\n\n  .MuiDataGrid-cell {\n    outline: none !important;\n  }\n\n  .MuiDataGrid-columnHeaders {\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    width: 100%;\n  }\n\n  .MuiCheckbox-root {\n    padding: 2px;\n  }\n  .MuiCheckbox-root .MuiSvgIcon-root {\n    font-size: 16px;\n  }\n&#96;;\n\nexport const ActionButtonContainer = styled(\"div\")\n;",

        "contents": "import Card from \"@mui/material/Card\";\nimport Grid from \"@mui/material/Grid\";\nimport ListItemText from \"@mui/material/ListItemText\";\nimport { styled } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\n\nexport const ViewListItemText = styled(ListItemText)&#96;\n  .MuiListItemText-primary {\n    font-size: ${({ theme }) =&gt; theme.typography.body2.fontSize};\n    font-weight: 500;\n  }\n  .MuiListItemText-secondary {\n    font-size: ${({ theme }) =&gt; theme.typography.body2.fontSize};\n  }\n&#96;;\n\nexport const ViewRowGrid = styled(Grid)({\n  minHeight: 60,\n  alignItems: \"center\",\n});",

            "line": 200,
            "column": 62
          }
        },
        "contents": "const Card: React.FC&lt;CardProps&gt; = ({ title, subtitle, action, children }) =&gt; (\n  &lt;Paper\n    variant=\"outlined\"\n    sx={{\n      p: 6.25,\n      height: \"100%\",\n      display: \"flex\",\n      flexDirection: \"column\",\n      gap: 1.25,\n      borderRadius: 2,\n      borderColor: (t) =&gt; t.palette.divider,\n      transition: \"box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s\",\n      \"&amp;:hover\": { boxShadow: 6 },\n    }}\n  &gt;\n    {(title || action) &amp;&amp; (\n      &lt;Stack direction=\"row\" alignItems=\"center\" justifyContent=\"space-between\" sx={{ mb: 1 }}&gt;\n        &lt;div&gt;\n          {title &amp;&amp; (\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"h6\" sx={{ lineHeight: 1.2 }}&gt;\n              {title}\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n          )}\n          {subtitle &amp;&amp; (\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"body2\" color=\"text.secondary\"&gt;\n              {subtitle}\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n          )}\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n        {action}\n      &lt;/Stack&gt;\n    )}\n    &lt;Box\n      sx={{\n        display: \"flex\",\n        flexDirection: \"column\",\n        flex: 1,\n        minHeight: 0,\n      }}\n    &gt;\n      {children}\n    &lt;/Box&gt;\n  &lt;/Paper&gt;\n);\n\ntype LineChartPoint = { label: string; a: number; b: number };",
        "signatures": {},

        "contents": "export const ToolbarButton: React.FC&lt;ToolbarButtonProps&gt; = ({\n  startIcon,\n  children,\n  sx,\n  ...props\n}) =&gt; {\n  const theme = useTheme();\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Button\n      variant=\"outlined\"\n      color=\"secondary\"\n      startIcon={startIcon}\n      sx={{\n        backgroundColor: theme.palette.background.secondary,\n        borderColor: \"#E4E4E7\",\n        \"&amp;:hover\": {\n          backgroundColor: theme.palette.background.primaryHover,\n        },\n        ...sx,\n      }}\n      {...props}\n    &gt;\n      {children}\n    &lt;/Button&gt;\n  );\n};",

        "contents": "import React from \"react\";\nimport Box from \"@mui/material/Box\";\nimport Grid from \"@mui/material/Grid\";\nimport IconButton from \"@mui/material/IconButton\";\nimport Drawer from \"@mui/material/Drawer\";\nimport Typography from \"@mui/material/Typography\";\nimport Chip from \"@mui/material/Chip\";\nimport { Component } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport {\n  MDXEditor,\n  headingsPlugin,\n  quotePlugin,\n  listsPlugin,\n  linkPlugin,\n  linkDialogPlugin,\n  imagePlugin,\n  tablePlugin,\n  thematicBreakPlugin,\n  frontmatterPlugin,\n  codeBlockPlugin,\n  codeMirrorPlugin,\n  markdownShortcutPlugin,\n  toolbarPlugin,\n  diffSourcePlugin,\n  jsxPlugin,\n  BoldItalicUnderlineToggles,\n  CodeToggle,\n  CreateLink,\n  InsertImage,\n  InsertTable,\n  InsertThematicBreak,\n  ListsToggle,\n  Separator,\n  DiffSourceToggleWrapper,\n} from \"@mdxeditor/editor\";\nimport SyntaxValidationPreview from \"@components/syntax-validation-preview\";\nimport { MDXEditorNewProps } from \"./types\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";\nimport { useMdxComponents } from \"./hooks\";\nimport { MdxComponentsPanel } from \"./components\";\nimport { buildSourceModeExtensions, buildCodeBlockExtensions } from \"./codemirror-extensions\";\nimport type { ImageUploadCallbacks, ImageUploadError } from \"./codemirror-extensions\";\nimport { useConfig } from \"@providers/config-provider\";\nimport { isCodeEditorLineNumbersEnabled } from \"@utils/config-helpers\";\nimport { useNotificationsService } from \"@hooks\";\nimport { useErrorDetailsModal } from \"@providers/error-details-modal-provider\";\nimport { parseApiError } from \"@utils/api-error-parser\";\nimport { toast } from \"react-toastify\";\nimport \"@mdxeditor/editor/style.css\";\nimport \"./styles.css\";\n\nconst MDXEditorNew = (\n;",

        "contents": "import { styled } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\nimport Toolbar from \"@mui/material/Toolbar\";\n\nexport const AppBarStyled = styled(AppBar)&#96;\n  position: sticky;\n  top: 0;\n  z-index: 1100;\n  height: 64px;\n  background-color: ${({ theme }) =&gt; theme.palette.background.default};\n  border-bottom: 1px solid\n    ${({ theme }) =&gt;\n      theme.palette.mode === \"dark\" ? theme.palette.secondary.light : theme.palette.divider};\n  box-shadow: none;\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: center;\n&#96;;\n\nexport const AppBarToolbar = styled(Toolbar)\n;",

      "codeBlock": {

            "column": 1

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 92,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * A syntax-highlighted code block component specifically for MDX examples\n * Uses the same CodeEditor that's used elsewhere in the application\n */\nexport const MdxCodeBlock: React.FC&lt;MdxCodeBlockProps&gt; = ({ code, readOnly = true }) =&gt; {\n  return (\n    &lt;Box\n      sx={{\n        borderRadius: 1,\n        overflow: \"hidden\",\n        backgroundColor: \"grey.100\",\n        border: \"1px solid\",\n        borderColor: \"grey.300\",\n        \"&amp; .w-tc-editor\": {\n          backgroundColor: \"transparent !important\",\n          minHeight: \"auto !important\",\n        },\n        \"&amp; .w-tc-editor-text\": {\n          fontFamily: \"monospace !important\",\n          fontSize: \"0.8rem !important\",\n          lineHeight: \"1.4 !important\",\n        },\n        \"&amp; .w-tc-editor-focus\": {\n          outline: \"none !important\",\n          boxShadow: \"none !important\",\n        },\n        // Enhanced syntax highlighting colors for better readability\n        \"&amp; .token.tag\": {\n          color: \"#d73a49 !important\", // HTML/JSX tags\n        },\n        \"&amp; .token.attr-name\": {\n          color: \"#6f42c1 !important\", // Attribute names\n        },\n        \"&amp; .token.attr-value\": {\n          color: \"#032f62 !important\", // Attribute values\n        },\n        \"&amp; .token.string\": {\n          color: \"#032f62 !important\", // Strings\n        },\n        \"&amp; .token.comment\": {\n          color: \"#6a737d !important\", // Comments\n          fontStyle: \"italic !important\",\n        },\n        \"&amp; .token.keyword\": {\n          color: \"#d73a49 !important\", // Keywords (function, const, etc.)\n        },\n        \"&amp; .token.punctuation\": {\n          color: \"#24292e !important\", // Brackets, parentheses, etc.\n        },\n        // Legacy selectors for older versions\n        \"&amp; .w-tc-editor-var\": {\n          color: \"#d73a49 !important\",\n        },\n        \"&amp; .w-tc-editor-property\": {\n          color: \"#6f42c1 !important\",\n        },\n        \"&amp; .w-tc-editor-string\": {\n          color: \"#032f62 !important\",\n        },\n        \"&amp; .w-tc-editor-comment\": {\n          color: \"#6a737d !important\",\n;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 10

            "lineNumber": 15

            "lineNumber": 17

            "text": "          fontSize: \"0.8rem !important\",",

        "contents": "import ListItemText from \"@mui/material/ListItemText\";\nimport { styled } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\n\nexport const DashboardListItem = styled(ListItem)({\n  alignItems: \"center\",\n  paddingLeft: \"0\",\n  disablePadding: true,\n});\n\nexport const DashboardListItemText = styled(ListItemText)\n;",

        "contents": "const MetricTile: React.FC&lt;{\n  label: string;\n  value?: number | string | null;\n  valueFormatter?: (n: number) =&gt; string;\n  changePct?: number | null;\n  loading?: boolean;\n}&gt; = ({ label, value, valueFormatter, changePct, loading }) =&gt; (\n  &lt;Paper\n    variant=\"outlined\"\n    sx={{\n      p: 6.25,\n      minHeight: 140,\n      display: \"flex\",\n      flexDirection: \"column\",\n      gap: 1.25,\n      transition: \"box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s\",\n      \"&amp;:hover\": { boxShadow: 6 },\n    }}\n  &gt;\n    &lt;Typography variant=\"body2\" color=\"text.secondary\" sx={{ mb: 0.5 }}&gt;\n      {label}\n    &lt;/Typography&gt;\n    {loading ? (\n      &lt;Box&gt;\n        &lt;Skeleton width={80} height={32} /&gt;\n        &lt;Skeleton width={120} height={20} /&gt;\n      &lt;/Box&gt;\n    ) : (\n      &lt;&gt;\n        &lt;Box&gt;\n          {typeof value === \"number\" ? (\n            &lt;NumberBadge value={value} formatter={valueFormatter} /&gt;\n          ) : (\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"h4\"&gt;{value ?? \"—\"}&lt;/Typography&gt;\n          )}\n        &lt;/Box&gt;\n        &lt;Stack direction=\"row\" spacing={1} alignItems=\"center\"&gt;\n          &lt;ChangeChip pct={changePct ?? undefined} /&gt;\n          {changePct !== null &amp;&amp; changePct !== undefined &amp;&amp; (\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"caption\" color=\"text.secondary\"&gt;\n              {\"vs. previous period\"}\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n          )}\n        &lt;/Stack&gt;\n      &lt;/&gt;\n    )}\n  &lt;/Paper&gt;\n);\n\nconst SectionLoader = () =&gt; (\n  &lt;Stack gap={1}&gt;\n;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "contents": "export function GenericForm&lt;TView extends BasicTypeForGeneric, TCreate, TUpdate&gt;({\n  editable,\n  getItemFn,\n  createItemFn,\n  updateItemFn,\n  detailsSchema,\n  updateSchema,\n  createSchema,\n  mode,\n  getItemId,\n  onSaved,\n  customDictionaries,\n  triggerSave,\n  triggerCancel,\n  onSaveHandled,\n  onCancelHandled,\n  fieldSections,\n}: GenericFormProps&lt;TView, TCreate, TUpdate&gt;) {\n(section) =&gt; {\n\n                  )}\n                  &lt;Box\n                    display=\"grid\"\n                    gridTemplateColumns={{ xs: \"1fr\", sm: \"1fr 1fr\", md: \"1fr 1fr 1fr\" }}\n                    gap={4}\n                    width=\"100%\"\n                    maxWidth=\"100%\"\n                  &gt;\n                    {sectionFields.map((field) =&gt; (\n                      &lt;Grid key={field.name} marginBottom={0}&gt;\n                        {editable ? getEdit(field) : getView(field)}\n                      &lt;/Grid&gt;\n                    ))}\n                  &lt;/Box&gt;\n                &lt;/Box&gt;\n              );\n            })\n          ) : (\n            &lt;Grid container spacing={4} marginBottom={4}&gt;\n              &lt;Grid container size={{ xs: 12, sm: 12 }}&gt;\n                {SectionIcon &amp;&amp; (\n                  &lt;Box sx={{ mr: 1.5, display: \"flex\", color: \"primary.main\" }}&gt;\n                    &lt;SectionIcon size={22} /&gt;\n                  &lt;/Box&gt;\n                )}\n                &lt;Typography variant=\"subtitle1\" fontWeight=\"500\" color=\"primary.main\"&gt;\n                  {&#96;Add ${moduleName} Details&#96;}\n                &lt;/Typography&gt;\n              &lt;/Grid&gt;\n              {fieldsSet()\n                .filter((field) =&gt; !field.hide)\n                .map((field) =&gt;\n                  editable ? (\n                    &lt;Grid key={field.name} size={{ xs: 4, sm: 4 }}&gt;\n                      {getEdit(field)}\n                    &lt;/Grid&gt;\n                  ) : (\n                    &lt;Grid key={field.name} size={{ xs: 3, sm: 3 }}&gt;\n                      {getView(field)}\n                    &lt;/Grid&gt;\n                  )\n                )}\n            &lt;/Grid&gt;\n          )}\n        &lt;/CardContent&gt;\n      &lt;/Card&gt;\n    &lt;/&gt;\n  );\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/mdx-editor-new/styles.css",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 87,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "contents": "/* MDX Editor Container */\n.mdx-editor-container {\n  height: 100%;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n/* Main MDX Editor Styling */\n.mdx-editor-new {\n  height: 100%;\n  width: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-editor {\n  height: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n/* Content area with proper scrolling */\n.mdx-editor-content {\n  flex: 1;\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  overflow-x: hidden;\n  min-height: 400px;\n  font-family: \"Helvetica Neue\", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;\n  font-size: 16px;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n  padding: 16px;\n  max-height: calc(100vh - 144px);\n}\n\n/* Ensure prosemirror editor has proper scrolling */\n.mdx-editor-new .ProseMirror {\n  overflow-y: auto !important;\n  max-height: none !important;\n  min-height: 400px;\n}\n\n/* CodeMirror editor scrolling for source mode */\n.mdx-editor-new .cm-editor {\n  overflow-y: auto !important;\n  max-height: calc(100vh - 244px) !important;\n  min-height: 400px;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .cm-scroller {\n  overflow-y: auto !important;\n  overflow-x: auto !important;\n}\n\n/* Toolbar customization */\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] {\n  border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;\n  padding: 8px 16px;\n  background-color: #fafafa;\n}\n\n/* Ensure diff/source toggle buttons are visible */\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[data-testid^=\"diff-\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[data-testid^=\"source-\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[aria-label*=\"view\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[aria-label*=\"diff\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[aria-label*=\"source\"] {\n  display: inline-flex !important;\n  visibility: visible !important;\n  opacity: 1 !important;\n}\n\n/* Style the diff/source mode toggle buttons */\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button {\n  margin-right: 8px;\n  padding: 4px 8px;\n  background-color: #fff;\n  border: 1px solid #ddd;\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button:hover {\n  background-color: #f5f5f5;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button[data-active=\"true\"] {\n  ",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/* MDX Editor Container */",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": ".mdx-editor-container {",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "  height: 100%;",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "  overflow: hidden;",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "/* Main MDX Editor Styling */",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": ".mdx-editor-new {",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "  height: 100%;",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "  width: 100%;",
            "lineNumber": 10

          {
            "text": "  display: flex;",

            "text": "  flex-direction: column;",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "  overflow: hidden;",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": ".mdx-editor-new .mdx-editor {",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  height: 100%;",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  display: flex;",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  flex-direction: column;",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  overflow: hidden;",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "/* Content area with proper scrolling */",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": ".mdx-editor-content {",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "  flex: 1;",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "  overflow-y: auto;",
            "lineNumber": 26

          {

            "lineNumber": 34

          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "/* Ensure prosemirror editor has proper scrolling */",
            "lineNumber": 36

            "text": ".mdx-editor-new .ProseMirror {",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },

            "text": "  overflow-y: auto !important;",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },

            "text": "  max-height: none !important;",
            "lineNumber": 39
