          {
            "text": "  min-height: 400px;",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "/* CodeMirror editor scrolling for source mode */",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "  overflow-y: auto !important;",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "}",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },

            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "/* Toolbar customization */",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": ".mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] {",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "  border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },

          },
          {
            "text": "  background-color: #fafafa;",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "/* Ensure diff/source toggle buttons are visible */",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": ".mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[data-testid^=\"diff-\"],",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": ".mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[data-testid^=\"source-\"],",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": ".mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[aria-label*=\"view\"],",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": ".mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[aria-label*=\"diff\"],",

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "  visibility: visible !important;",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "  opacity: 1 !important;",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {

          },

        "contents": "import Card from \"@mui/material/Card\";\nimport CardHeader from \"@mui/material/CardHeader\";\nimport Grid from \"@mui/material/Grid\";\nimport ListItem from \"@mui/material/ListItem\";\nimport ListItemText from \"@mui/material/ListItemText\";\nimport Paper from \"@mui/material/Paper\";\nimport { styled } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\n\nexport const ActionsContainer = styled(\"div\")&#96;\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  align-items: center;\n&#96;;\n\nexport const LeftContainer = styled(\"div\")&#96;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n&#96;;",

            "column": 2
          }

        "contents": "export const SearchBar = ({\n  setSearchTermOnChange,\n  searchBoxLabel,\n  initialValue,\n}: SearchBoxProps) =&gt; {\n  const [searchValue, setSearchValue] = useState(initialValue || \"\");\n  const [timer, setTimer] = useState&lt;NodeJS.Timeout | null&gt;(null);\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    setSearchValue(initialValue || \"\");\n  }, [initialValue]);\n\n  const handleChange = (event: React.ChangeEvent&lt;HTMLInputElement&gt;) =&gt; {\n    const value = event.target.value;\n    setSearchValue(value);\n\n    if (timer) {\n      clearTimeout(timer);\n    }\n    setTimer(\n      setTimeout(() =&gt; {\n        setSearchTermOnChange(value);\n      }, 800)\n    );\n  };\n\n  const handleClear = () =&gt; {\n    if (timer) {\n      clearTimeout(timer);\n    }\n    setSearchValue(\"\");\n    setSearchTermOnChange(\"\");\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Box&gt;\n      &lt;TextField\n        size=\"small\"\n        value={searchValue}\n        InputProps={{\n          startAdornment: (\n            &lt;InputAdornment position=\"start\" sx={{ p: 0 }}&gt;\n              &lt;IconButton sx={{ p: 0 }}&gt;\n                &lt;Search size={18} /&gt;\n              &lt;/IconButton&gt;\n            &lt;/InputAdornment&gt;\n          ),\n          endAdornment: searchValue ? (\n            &lt;InputAdornment position=\"end\" sx={{ p: 0 }}&gt;\n              &lt;IconButton sx={{ p: 0 }} onClick={handleClear} aria-label=\"Clear search\"&gt;\n                &lt;X size={18} /&gt;\n              &lt;/IconButton&gt;\n            &lt;/InputAdornment&gt;\n          ) : null,\n        }}\n        placeholder={searchBoxLabel}\n        onChange={handleChange}\n        sx={(theme) =&gt; ({\n          minWidth: 400,\n          backgroundColor: theme.palette.background.secondary,\n          \"&amp; .MuiInputBase-input\": {\n            fontSize: \"0.9rem\",\n            padding: 2,\n            \"&amp;::placeholder\": {\n              fontSize: \"0.9rem\",\n              opacity: 0.6,\n            },\n          },\n          \"&amp; .MuiOutlinedInput-notchedOutline\": {\n            borderColor: \"#E4E4E7\",\n          },\n          mr: 2,\n        })}\n      &gt;&lt;/TextField&gt;\n    &lt;/Box&gt;\n  );\n};",

        "contents": "const mainTheme = createTheme(themeOptions);\n\nexport const ThemeProvider = memo(function ThemeProvider({ children }: PropsWithChildren) {\n  return (\n    &lt;&gt;\n      &lt;CssBaseline /&gt;\n      &lt;MUIThemeProvider theme={mainTheme}&gt;{children}&lt;/MUIThemeProvider&gt;\n    &lt;/&gt;\n  );\n});",
        "signatures": {},

          {
            "text": "const mainTheme = createTheme(themeOptions);",

            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "export const ThemeProvider = memo(function ThemeProvider({ children }: PropsWithChildren) {",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "  return (",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "    &lt;&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "      &lt;CssBaseline /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "      &lt;MUIThemeProvider theme={mainTheme}&gt;{children}&lt;/MUIThemeProvider&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "    &lt;/&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "  );",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "});",
            "lineNumber": 101
          }
        ]

        "contents": "export const AIEditDialog = \n,\n        }}\n      /&gt;\n\n      &lt;Dialog\n        open={open}\n        onClose={handleClose}\n        maxWidth=\"sm\"\n        fullWidth\n        sx={{\n          zIndex: (theme: Theme) =&gt; theme.zIndex.modal,\n          \"&amp; .MuiDialog-paper\": {\n            borderRadius: 3,\n            overflow: \"visible\",\n          },\n        }}\n      &gt;\n        &lt;DialogTitle\n          sx={{\n            pb: 2,\n            background: \"linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%)\",\n            color: \"white\",\n          }}\n        &gt;\n          &lt;Box sx={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: 2 }}&gt;\n            &lt;Box\n              sx={{\n                display: \"flex\",\n                alignItems: \"center\",\n                justifyContent: \"center\",\n                width: 40,\n                height: 40,\n                borderRadius: \"50%\",\n                bgcolor: \"rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)\",\n                backdropFilter: \"blur(10px)\",\n              }}\n            &gt;\n              &lt;Sparkles size={20} /&gt;\n            &lt;/Box&gt;\n            &lt;Box&gt;\n              &lt;Typography variant=\"h6\" component=\"span\" sx={{ fontWeight: 600 }}&gt;\n                Edit Content with AI\n              &lt;/Typography&gt;\n              &lt;Typography variant=\"body2\" sx={{ opacity: 0.9, fontSize: \"0.875rem\" }}&gt;\n                Refine and improve your content using AI\n              &lt;/Typography&gt;\n            &lt;/Box&gt;\n          &lt;/Box&gt;\n          &lt;IconButton\n            aria-label=\"close\"\n            onClick={handleClose}\n            sx={{\n              position: \"absolute\",\n              right: 8,\n              top: 8,\n              color: \"white\",\n              bgcolor: \"rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)\",\n              \"&amp;:hover\": {\n                bgcolor: \"rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)\",\n              },\n            }}\n          &gt;\n            &lt;X size={20} /&gt;\n          &lt;/IconButton&gt;\n        &lt;/DialogTitle&gt;\n\n        &lt;DialogContent sx={{ p: 4 }}&gt;\n          {\n;",

---


## Modernization changes

### 1. Typography
- Updated font stack with system fonts
- Improved heading hierarchy (h1–h6)
- Better line heights and letter spacing
- Consistent font weights

### 2. Color palette
- Modern slate-based grays (Tailwind-inspired)
- Updated semantic colors (success, error, warning, info)
- Improved contrast ratios
- Consistent color naming

### 3. Shadows
- Subtle, modern shadows
- Replaced heavy shadows with lighter ones
- Better depth hierarchy

### 4. Component defaults
- Buttons: rounded corners (8px), no text transform, better hover states
- Cards: 12px border radius, subtle borders, modern shadows
- TextFields: 8px border radius, better hover states
- Chips: 6px border radius
- Dialogs: 16px border radius, modern shadows
- DataGrid: updated styling with better borders and hover states

### 5. Shape
- Default border radius: 8px
- Consistent rounded corners across components

### 6. Spacing
- Maintained 4px spacing unit
- Better padding defaults

## Next steps (optional)

1. Gradually migrate styled components to `sx` prop
2. Add dark mode support
3. Use CSS variables for dynamic theming
4. Update component usage to leverage new defaults

The theme is now more modern and consistent. Components will automatically use the new styling. Should I help modernize specific components or add dark mode support?

## Fixed issues

### 1. Navigation menu accessibility and styling

**Before:**
- Low contrast: light blue text on blue background (selected state)
- Dark hover state with low contrast
- Icons too light (using subtitle2 color)

**After:**
- Better contrast: primary text color for default state
- Light grey hover (`palette.grey[100]`) instead of dark
- Selected state: primary color text on light primary background with bold font
- Icons use proper text colors with hover feedback
- Improved accessibility and readability

### 2. Card hover states removed

**Removed from:**
- Global `MuiCard` component (theme level)
- Dashboard metric tiles
- Dashboard cards

Cards no longer change on hover; they remain static.

## Changes made

1. `src/components/side-bar/index.styled.tsx`:
   - Updated `SidebarLink` colors for better contrast
   - Changed hover from dark to light grey
   - Improved selected state styling
   - Fixed icon colors

2. `src/providers/theme-provider.tsx`:
   - Disabled card hover effects globally

3. `src/features/dashboard/index.tsx`:
   - Removed hover boxShadow from cards
   - Removed hover-only transitions

The navigation menu should now be more accessible and visually consistent, and cards no longer have hover effects.

---


Fixed the Emotion error. The issue was using a component selector (`${SidebarLink}:hover &`), which requires the Emotion babel plugin.

## Fixed

1. Removed the component selector from `ListItemIconStyled` that referenced `SidebarLink`
2. Used a class-based approach with the `sx` prop instead:
   - Added `className="sidebar-icon"` to `ListItemIconStyled`
   - Used `"&:hover .sidebar-icon"` in the `sx` prop of `SidebarLink`
3. Fixed TypeScript errors by properly typing the styled components

The navigation menu should now work without the Emotion compilation error. The hover effect on icons is handled via the `sx` prop using a standard CSS class selector, which doesn't require the Emotion babel plugin.

The error should be resolved. Refresh your browser to see the changes.

        "contents": "export const ImageSelectionDialog: React.FC&lt;ImageSelectionDialogProps&gt; = \n\n                {imageItems.length &gt; 0 ? (\n                  &lt;Box&gt;\n                    &lt;Typography variant=\"subtitle2\" gutterBottom&gt;\n                      Images ({imageItems.length})\n                    &lt;/Typography&gt;\n                    &lt;Grid container spacing={2}&gt;\n                      {imageItems.map((item) =&gt; (\n                        &lt;Grid size={{ xs: 6, sm: 4, md: 3 }} key={item.id}&gt;\n                          &lt;Paper\n                            elevation={selectedItem?.id === item.id ? 3 : 1}\n                            sx={{\n                              position: \"relative\",\n                              cursor: \"pointer\",\n                              border:\n                                selectedItem?.id === item.id ? \"2px solid\" : \"1px solid #e0e0e0\",\n                              borderColor:\n                                selectedItem?.id === item.id ? \"primary.main\" : \"#e0e0e0\",\n                              borderRadius: 2,\n                              overflow: \"hidden\",\n                              transition: \"all 0.2s\",\n                              \"&amp;:hover\": {\n                                elevation: 3,\n                                transform: \"translateY(-2px)\",\n                              },\n                            }}\n                            onClick={() =&gt; handleImageSelect(item)}\n                          &gt;\n                            &lt;Box\n                              sx={{\n                                position: \"relative\"\n                      )\n;",

        "contents": "const ItemCard = \n\n  if (item.updatedAt) {\n    metaDateLabel = \"Updated:\";\n    metaDateValue = new Date(item.updatedAt).toLocaleDateString();\n  } else if (item.createdAt) {\n    metaDateLabel = \"Created:\";\n    metaDateValue = new Date(item.createdAt).toLocaleDateString();\n  }\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Card\n      sx={{\n        display: \"flex\",\n        flexDirection: \"column\",\n        height: 414,\n        borderRadius: 3,\n        overflow: \"hidden\",\n        boxShadow: 1,\n        transition: \"box-shadow 0.2s\",\n        \"&amp;:hover\": { boxShadow: 6 },\n      }}\n      variant=\"outlined\"\n    &gt;\n      &lt;Box\n        sx={{\n          position: \"relative\",\n          height: 180,\n          width: \"100%\",\n          overflow: \"hidden\",\n        }}\n      &gt;\n        {item.type &amp;&amp; (\n          &lt;Chip\n            label={idToDisplayName(item.type)}\n            size=\"small\"\n            sx={{\n              position: \"absolute\",\n              top: 16,\n              left: 16,\n              zIndex: 2,\n              fontWeight: 700,\n              fontSize: 12,\n              height: 24,\n              borderRadius: 1,\n              backgroundColor: getTypeColor(item.type, theme),\n              color: theme.palette.getContrastText(getTypeColor(item.type, theme)),\n              boxShadow: 1,\n            }}\n          /&gt;\n        )}\n        {/* Content status chip */}\n        &lt;Tooltip title={publishedTooltipTitle} disableHoverListener={!publishedTooltipTitle} arrow&gt;\n          &lt;Chip\n            label={contentStatus.status}\n            color={contentStatus.color}\n            variant=\"filled\"\n            size=\"small\"\n            sx={{\n              position: \"absolute\",\n              top: 16,\n              right: 16,\n              zIndex: 2,\n              fontWeight: 700,\n              fontSize: 12,\n              height: 24,\n              borderRadius: 1,\n              boxShadow: 1,\n            }}\n          /&gt;\n        &lt;/Tooltip&gt;\n        &lt;CardMedia\n          component=\"img\"\n;",

        "contents": "import styled from \"@emotion/styled\";\nimport Paper from \"@mui/material/Paper\";\n\nexport const DataTableContainer = styled(Paper)&#96;\n  flex-grow: 1;\n\n  &amp;&amp; .MuiDataGrid-columnHeaders {\n    --DataGrid-t-header-background-base: #f8faff;\n  }\n\n  &amp;&amp; .MuiDataGrid-columnHeader {\n    color: #71717a;\n  }\n\n  &amp;&amp; .MuiDataGrid-row:hover {\n    background-color: #fafcff;\n  }\n\n  .MuiCheckbox-root .MuiSvgIcon-root {\n    font-size: 20px;\n    color: #71717a;\n  }\n\n  .MuiCheckbox-root.Mui-checked .MuiSvgIcon-root {\n    color: #3878ff;\n  }\n\n  .MuiDataGrid-columnHeader .MuiCheckbox-root.Mui-checked .MuiSvgIcon-root,\n  .MuiDataGrid-columnHeader .MuiCheckbox-root.MuiCheckbox-indeterminate .MuiSvgIcon-root {\n    color: #3878ff !important;\n  }\n&#96;;\n\nexport const ActionButtonContainer = styled(\"div\")\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {

          }
        },
        "contents": "const Card: React.FC&lt;CardProps&gt; = ({ title, subtitle, action, children }) =&gt; (\n  &lt;Paper\n    variant=\"outlined\"\n    sx={{\n      p: 6.25,\n      height: \"100%\",\n      display: \"flex\",\n      flexDirection: \"column\",\n      gap: 1.25,\n      borderRadius: 2,\n      borderColor: (t) =&gt; t.palette.divider,\n    }}\n  &gt;\n    {(title || action) &amp;&amp; (\n      &lt;Stack direction=\"row\" alignItems=\"center\" justifyContent=\"space-between\" sx={{ mb: 1 }}&gt;\n        &lt;div&gt;\n          {title &amp;&amp; (\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"h6\" sx={{ lineHeight: 1.2 }}&gt;\n              {title}\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n          )}\n          {subtitle &amp;&amp; (\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"body2\" color=\"text.secondary\"&gt;\n              {subtitle}\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n          )}\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n        {action}\n      &lt;/Stack&gt;\n    )}\n    &lt;Box\n      sx={{\n        display: \"flex\",\n        flexDirection: \"column\",\n        flex: 1,\n        minHeight: 0,\n      }}\n    &gt;\n      {children}\n    &lt;/Box&gt;\n  &lt;/Paper&gt;\n);\n\ntype LineChartPoint = { label: string; a: number; b: number };",

        "contents": "const NoRecordsDisplay: React.FC&lt;NoRecordsDisplayProps&gt; = \nconst getIcon = \n\n    return &lt;FileX size={48} /&gt;;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Box\n      sx={{\n        display: \"flex\",\n        justifyContent: \"center\",\n        alignItems: \"center\",\n        minHeight: 300,\n        py: 6,\n        px: 2,\n        opacity: visible ? 1 : 0,\n        transition: \"opacity 0.3s ease\",\n        position: \"relative\",\n        zIndex: 10,\n      }}\n    &gt;\n      &lt;Paper\n        elevation={0}\n        sx={{\n          p: 6,\n          textAlign: \"center\",\n          backgroundColor: \"grey.50\",\n          borderRadius: 3,\n          border: \"2px dashed\",\n          borderColor: \"grey.300\",\n          maxWidth: 500,\n          width: \"100%\",\n        }}\n      &gt;\n        &lt;Box\n          sx={{\n            display: \"flex\",\n            justifyContent: \"center\",\n            mb: 3,\n            color: \"grey.400\",\n          }}\n        &gt;\n          {getIcon()}\n        &lt;/Box&gt;\n\n        &lt;Typography\n          variant=\"h6\"\n          sx={{\n            mb: 2,\n            fontWeight: 600,\n            color: \"grey.700\",\n          }}\n        &gt;\n          {message || \"No Content Found\"}\n        &lt;/Typography&gt;\n\n        &lt;Typography\n          variant=\"body1\"\n          sx={{\n            mb: hasActiveFilters ? 3 : 0,\n            color: \"grey.600\",\n            lineHeight: 1.6,\n          }}\n        &gt;\n          {getContextualMessage()}\n        &lt;/Typography&gt;\n\n        {hasActiveFilters &amp;&amp; onClearFilters &amp;&amp; (\n          &lt;Button\n            variant=\"outlined\"\n            startIcon={&lt;RefreshCw size={16} /&gt;}\n            onClick={onClearFilters}\n            sx={{\n              mt: 1,\n              borderColor: \"grey.400\",\n              color: \"grey.700\",\n              \"&amp;:hover\": {\n                borderColor: \"primary.main\",\n                backgroundColor: \"primary.50\",\n              },\n            }}\n          &gt;\n            Clear All Filters\n          &lt;/Button&gt;\n        )}\n      &lt;/Paper&gt;\n    &lt;/Box&gt;\n  );\n};\n\nexport default NoRecordsDisplay;",

        "contents": "const ValidationStatusBubble: React.FC&lt;ValidationStatusBubbleProps&gt; = \n\n      &lt;/Tooltip&gt;\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Error state - show prominent error indicator (similar to preview error style)\n  return (\n    &lt;Tooltip title={renderTooltipContent()} placement=\"left\"&gt;\n      &lt;Paper\n        elevation={6}\n        sx={{\n          position: \"absolute\",\n          bottom: 16,\n          right: previewPaneVisible ? \"calc(50% + 24px)\" : 16, // Avoid preview pane\n          zIndex: 1000,\n          borderRadius: \"8px\",\n          overflow: \"hidden\",\n          border: \"2px solid #dc3545\",\n        }}\n      &gt;\n        &lt;Box\n          sx={{\n            display: \"flex\",\n            alignItems: \"center\",\n            gap: 1.5,\n            px: 2.5,\n            py: 1.5,\n            backgroundColor: \"#f8d7da\",\n            color: \"#721c24\",\n            borderLeft: \"4px solid #dc3545\",\n            minWidth: \"120px\",\n          }}\n        &gt;\n          &lt;Box sx={{ color: \"error.main\" }}&gt;\n            {validation.error ? getErrorIcon(validation.error.type, 20) : &lt;AlertCircle size={20} /&gt;}\n          &lt;/Box&gt;\n          &lt;Box sx={{ flex: 1 }}&gt;\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"body2\" sx={{ fontSize: \"0.8rem\", fontWeight: 600, mb: 0.5 }}&gt;\n              Syntax Error\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"caption\" sx={{ fontSize: \"0.7rem\", opacity: 0.9 }}&gt;\n              {getLanguageLabel(validation.error?.type || format)}\n              {validation.error?.line &amp;&amp; &#96; • Line ${validation.error.line}&#96;}\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n          &lt;/Box&gt;\n        &lt;/Box&gt;\n      &lt;/Paper&gt;\n    &lt;/Tooltip&gt;\n  );\n};\n\nexport default ValidationStatusBubble;",

        "contents": "const Dashboard: React.FC = \n topContent &amp;&amp; topContent.length &gt; 0 ?         "contents": "export const ContentSortPopup: React.FC&lt;Props&gt; = ({\n  anchorEl,\n  open,\n  selectedField,\n  direction,\n  onClose,\n  onChangeField,\n  onToggleDirection,\n}) =&gt; {\n  const theme = useTheme();\n  return (\n    &lt;Popover\n      open={open}\n      anchorEl={anchorEl}\n      onClose={onClose}\n      anchorOrigin={{\n        vertical: \"bottom\",\n        horizontal: \"left\",\n      }}\n      transformOrigin={{\n        vertical: \"top\",\n        horizontal: \"left\",\n      }}\n      PaperProps={{\n        sx: { minWidth: 100, p: 0, borderRadius: 2, mt: 1 },\n      }}\n    &gt;\n      &lt;Stack spacing={1}&gt;\n        {SORT_OPTIONS.map((option) =&gt; (\n          &lt;Button\n            key={option.value}\n            fullWidth\n            color=\"secondary\"\n            variant=\"text\"\n            onClick={() =&gt; {\n              onChangeField(option.value);\n              onClose();\n            }}\n            sx={{\n              fontSize: \"14px\",\n              px: 3,\n              py: 1,\n              backgroundColor:\n                selectedField === option.value ? theme.palette.primary.light : undefined,\n              borderColor: \"#E4E4E7\",\n              color: theme.palette.text.secondary,\n              textTransform: \"none\",\n              justifyContent: \"flex-start\",\n              \"&amp;:hover\": {\n                backgroundColor: theme.palette.background.primaryHover,\n              },\n            }}\n          &gt;\n            &lt;Box display=\"flex\" alignItems=\"center\" width=\"100%\"&gt;\n              {selectedField === option.value &amp;&amp; &lt;Check size={14} style={{ marginRight: 4 }} /&gt;}\n              &lt;span&gt;{option.label}&lt;/span&gt;\n            &lt;/Box&gt;\n          &lt;/Button&gt;\n        ))}\n        &lt;Divider sx={{ my: 1 }} /&gt;\n        &lt;Button\n          color=\"secondary\"\n          variant=\"text\"\n;",

        "contents": "const MediaManagement = \n(item) =&gt; {\n\n                  &lt;Box\n                    sx={{\n                      width: \"100%\",\n                      aspectRatio: \"1 / 1\",\n                      position: \"relative\",\n                      overflow: \"hidden\",\n                      bgcolor: isFolder ? \"#FFF8E1\" : \"#F5F5F5\",\n                      borderBottom: \"1px solid #f0f0f0\",\n                      display: \"flex\",\n                      alignItems: \"center\",\n                      justifyContent: \"center\",\n                    }}\n                  &gt;\n                    {/* Show image preview for images, icon for others */}\n                    {type === \"image\" ? (\n                      &lt;Box\n                        sx={{\n                          position: \"absolute\",\n                          top: 0,\n                          left: 0,\n                          width: \"100%\",\n                          height: \"100%\",\n                          transition: \"transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(.4,2,.6,1)\",\n                          \"&amp;:hover\": {\n                            transform: \"scale(1.05)\",\n                          },\n                        }}\n                      &gt;\n                        &lt;img\n                          src={\n                            buildAbsoluteUrlWithCacheBust(\n                              item.location,\n                              item.size,\n                              item.updatedAt\n                            ) || \"/images/placeholder.svg\"\n                          }\n                          alt={item.name}\n                          style={{\n                            width: \"100%\",\n                            height: \"100%\",\n                            objectFit: \"cover\",\n                            display: \"block\",\n                            borderRadius: 0,\n                            background: \"#fafafa\",\n                          }}\n                          loading=\"lazy\"\n                        /&gt;\n                      &lt;/Box&gt;\n                    ) : (\n                      &lt;Box\n                        sx=\n          }\n;",

        "contents": "const Dashboard: React.FC = \n\n\n          {availability.cms.recentContent &amp;&amp; (\n            &lt;Grid size={{ xs: 12, md: 4 }}&gt;\n              &lt;Card title=\"Recent Content\" subtitle=\"Last 5 items\"&gt;\n                {recentContentLoading ? (\n                  &lt;SectionLoader /&gt;\n                ) : recentContentError ? (\n                  &lt;Typography color=\"error\" variant=\"body2\"&gt;\n                    {recentContentError}\n                  &lt;/Typography&gt;\n                ) : recentContent &amp;&amp; recentContent.length &gt; 0 ? (\n                  &lt;&gt;\n                    &lt;List dense sx={{ mb: 2 }}&gt;\n                      {recentContent.map((c) =&gt; {\n                        const toHref =\n                          typeof c.id === \"number\"\n                            ? &#96;${getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.content)}/${getEditFormRoute(c.id)}&#96;\n                            : undefined;\n                        return (\n                          &lt;ListItem\n                            key={c.id}\n                            sx={{\n                              px: 0,\n                              cursor: \"pointer\",\n                              \"&amp;:hover .list-link-text\": { textDecoration: \"underline\" },\n                            }}\n                            {...(toHref ? ({ component: GhostLink, to: toHref } as const) : {})}\n                          &gt;\n                            &lt;ListItemIcon&gt;\n                              &lt;FileText size={18} /&gt;\n                            &lt;/ListItemIcon&gt;\n                            &lt;ListItemText\n                              primary={c.title}\n                              slotProps={{\n                                primary: {\n                                  color: \"primary\",\n                                  className: \"list-link-text\",\n                                },\n                              }}\n                              secondary={&lt;Typography variant=\"body2\"&gt;{c.author ?? \"\"}&lt;/Typography&gt;}\n                            /&gt;\n                          &lt;/ListItem&gt;\n                        );\n                      })}\n                    &lt;/List&gt;\n;",

        "contents": ".mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button:hover {\n  background-color: #f5f5f5;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button[data-active=\"true\"] {\n  background-color: #1976d2;\n  color: white;\n}\n\n/* Error highlighting for frontmatter issues */\n.error-line {\n  border-bottom: 1px dashed red;\n}\n\n/* Override default MDX Editor styles to match application theme */\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-editor-focus-ring {\n  outline: 2px solid #1976d2;\n  outline-offset: 2px;\n}\n\n/* Preview panel styling */\n.mdx-editor-preview-panel {\n  border-left: 1px solid #e0e0e0;\n  background-color: #fff;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-preview-header {\n  background-color: #f5f5f5;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;\n  padding: 8px 16px;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  min-height: 40px;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-preview-title {\n  font-size: 14px;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  color: #333;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-preview-refresh-btn {\n  padding: 4px;\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  color: #666;\n  transition: background-color 0.2s ease;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-preview-refresh-btn:hover {\n  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);\n}\n\n/* Responsive adjustments */\n@media (max-width: 900px) {\n  .mdx-editor-new {\n    min-height: 300px;\n  }\n\n  .mdx-editor-content {\n    min-height: 300px;\n    padding: 12px;\n  }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "contents": "export const SidebarLink = styled(ListItemButton, {\n  shouldForwardProp: (prop) =&gt; prop !== \"isCollapsed\",\n})&lt;{ isCollapsed?: boolean }&gt;(({ theme, isCollapsed }) =&gt; &#96;\n  border-radius: ${theme.spacing(2)};\n  height: ${theme.spacing(9)};\n  margin-top: ${theme.spacing(1)};\n  margin-left: ${isCollapsed ? theme.spacing(1) : \"0\"};\n  margin-right: ${isCollapsed ? theme.spacing(1) : \"10px\"};\n  color: ${theme.palette.text.primary};\n  min-width: ${isCollapsed ? \"56px\" : \"auto\"};\n  justify-content: ${isCollapsed ? \"center\" : \"flex-start\"};\n  padding-left: ${isCollapsed ? \"0\" : theme.spacing(2)};\n  background-color: transparent;\n  transition: background-color 0.2s ease;\n  \n  :hover {\n    background-color: ${theme.palette.grey[100]};\n  }\n\n  &amp;.Mui-selected {\n    color: ${theme.palette.primary.main};\n    background-color: ${theme.palette.primary.light};\n    font-weight: 600;\n    \n    :hover {\n      background-color: ${theme.palette.primary.light};\n    }\n  }\n&#96;);\n\nexport const SidebarLinkText = styled(ListItemText, {\n  shouldForwardProp: (prop) =&gt; prop !== \"isCollapsed\",\n})\n;",
        "signatures": {},

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/mdx-editor-new/styles.css",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 87,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "contents": "/* MDX Editor Container */\n.mdx-editor-container {\n  height: 100%;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n/* Main MDX Editor Styling */\n.mdx-editor-new {\n  height: 100%;\n  width: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-editor {\n  height: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n/* Content area with proper scrolling */\n.mdx-editor-content {\n  flex: 1;\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  overflow-x: hidden;\n  min-height: 400px;\n  font-family: \"Helvetica Neue\", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;\n  font-size: 16px;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n  padding: 16px;\n  max-height: calc(100vh - 144px);\n}\n\n/* Ensure prosemirror editor has proper scrolling */\n.mdx-editor-new .ProseMirror {\n  overflow-y: auto !important;\n  max-height: none !important;\n  min-height: 400px;\n}\n\n/* CodeMirror editor scrolling for source mode */\n.mdx-editor-new .cm-editor {\n  overflow-y: auto !important;\n  max-height: calc(100vh - 244px) !important;\n  min-height: 400px;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .cm-scroller {\n  overflow-y: auto !important;\n  overflow-x: auto !important;\n}\n\n/* Toolbar customization */\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] {\n  border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;\n  padding: 8px 16px;\n  background-color: #fafafa;\n}\n\n/* Ensure diff/source toggle buttons are visible */\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[data-testid^=\"diff-\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[data-testid^=\"source-\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[aria-label*=\"view\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[aria-label*=\"diff\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[aria-label*=\"source\"] {\n  display: inline-flex !important;\n  visibility: visible !important;\n  opacity: 1 !important;\n}\n\n/* Style the diff/source mode toggle buttons */\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button {\n  margin-right: 8px;\n  padding: 4px 8px;\n  background-color: #fff;\n  border: 1px solid #ddd;\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button:hover {\n  background-color: #f5f5f5;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button[data-active=\"true\"] {\n  ",
        "signatures": {},

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/features/dashboard/index.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 278,
            "column": 2
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 332,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "const MetricTile: React.FC&lt;{\n  label: string;\n  value?: number | string | null;\n  valueFormatter?: (n: number) =&gt; string;\n  changePct?: number | null;\n  loading?: boolean;\n}&gt; = ({ label, value, valueFormatter, changePct, loading }) =&gt; (\n  &lt;Paper\n    variant=\"outlined\"\n    sx={{\n      p: 6.25,\n      minHeight: 140,\n      display: \"flex\",\n      flexDirection: \"column\",\n      gap: 1.25,\n    }}\n  &gt;\n    &lt;Typography variant=\"body2\" color=\"text.secondary\" sx={{ mb: 0.5 }}&gt;\n      {label}\n    &lt;/Typography&gt;\n    {loading ? (\n      &lt;Box&gt;\n        &lt;Skeleton width={80} height={32} /&gt;\n        &lt;Skeleton width={120} height={20} /&gt;\n      &lt;/Box&gt;\n    ) : (\n      &lt;&gt;\n        &lt;Box&gt;\n          {typeof value === \"number\" ? (\n            &lt;NumberBadge value={value} formatter={valueFormatter} /&gt;\n          ) : (\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"h4\"&gt;{value ?? \"—\"}&lt;/Typography&gt;\n          )}\n        &lt;/Box&gt;\n        &lt;Stack direction=\"row\" spacing={1} alignItems=\"center\"&gt;\n          &lt;ChangeChip pct={changePct ?? undefined} /&gt;\n          {changePct !== null &amp;&amp; changePct !== undefined &amp;&amp; (\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"caption\" color=\"text.secondary\"&gt;\n              {\"vs. previous period\"}\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n          )}\n        &lt;/Stack&gt;\n      &lt;/&gt;\n    )}\n  &lt;/Paper&gt;\n);\n\nconst SectionLoader = () =&gt; (\n  &lt;Stack gap={1}&gt;\n;",

        "contents": "export const CommentSortPopup: React.FC&lt;Props&gt; = ({\n  anchorEl,\n  open,\n  selectedField,\n  direction,\n  onClose,\n  onChangeField,\n  onToggleDirection,\n}) =&gt; {\n  const theme = useTheme();\n  return (\n    &lt;Popover\n      open={open}\n      anchorEl={anchorEl}\n      onClose={onClose}\n      anchorOrigin={{\n        vertical: \"bottom\",\n        horizontal: \"left\",\n      }}\n      transformOrigin={{\n        vertical: \"top\",\n        horizontal: \"left\",\n      }}\n      PaperProps={{\n        sx: { minWidth: 100, p: 0, borderRadius: 2, mt: 1 },\n      }}\n    &gt;\n      &lt;Stack spacing={1}&gt;\n        {SORT_OPTIONS.map((option) =&gt; (\n          &lt;Button\n            key={option.value}\n            fullWidth\n            color=\"secondary\"\n            variant=\"text\"\n            onClick={() =&gt; {\n              onChangeField(option.value);\n              onClose();\n            }}\n            sx={{\n              fontSize: \"14px\",\n              px: 3,\n              py: 1,\n              backgroundColor:\n                selectedField === option.value ? theme.palette.primary.light : undefined,\n              borderColor: \"#E4E4E7\",\n              color: theme.palette.text.secondary,\n              textTransform: \"none\",\n              justifyContent: \"flex-start\",\n              \"&amp;:hover\": {\n                backgroundColor: theme.palette.background.primaryHover,\n              },\n            }}\n          &gt;\n            &lt;Box display=\"flex\" alignItems=\"center\" width=\"100%\"&gt;\n              {selectedField === option.value &amp;&amp; &lt;Check size={14} style={{ marginRight: 4 }} /&gt;}\n              &lt;span&gt;{option.label}&lt;/span&gt;\n            &lt;/Box&gt;\n          &lt;/Button&gt;\n        ))}\n        &lt;Divider sx={{ my: 1 }} /&gt;\n        &lt;Button\n          color=\"secondary\"\n          variant=\"text\"\n;",

Removed all Paper hover states. Summary:

## Removed Paper hover states

### 1. Global theme override (`src/providers/theme-provider.tsx`)
- Added global `MuiPaper` override to disable hover effects
- Prevents hover boxShadow, transform, and elevation changes

### 2. Media feature (`src/features/media/index.tsx`)
- Removed `"&:hover": { boxShadow: 6 }` from Paper components
- Removed transition that was only for hover

### 3. Image selection dialog (`src/components/image-selection-dialog/image-selection-dialog.tsx`)
- Removed `"&:hover": { elevation: 3, transform: "translateY(-2px)" }`
- Removed transition

### 4. Content list (`src/features/content/content-list.tsx`)
- Removed `"&:hover": { boxShadow: 6 }` from Card components
- Removed transition

All Paper components (including Cards, which extend Paper) no longer have hover effects. They remain static on hover. The global theme override ensures any new Paper components won't have hover effects by default.

- Selected icon: `primary.main` (blue)

- Selected icon: `primary.contrastText` (white)

Updated the hover state:

## Changes Made

1. **Hover state** (`SidebarLink`):
   - Background: changes to `primary.light` (light blue)
   - Text color: uses `primary.contrastText` (white)
   - Icon color: uses `primary.contrastText` (white) via sx prop

2. **Selected state**:
   - Background: `primary.light` (light blue)
   - Text color: `primary.contrastText` (white)
   - Icon color: `primary.contrastText` (white)

On hover, only the background changes; text and icon use the contrast color (white) for consistency with the selected state. The icon color change is handled via the `sx` prop with a class selector to avoid the Emotion component selector issue.

Updated the hover states:

## Updated hover states

### 1. Non-selected items (hover)
- Background: `grey[50]` (lighter than before)
- Text: `text.primary` (dark)
- Icon: `text.primary` (dark)

### 2. Selected items (hover)
- Background: `primary.main` (darker than selected state)
- Text: `primary.contrastText` (white, unchanged)
- Icon: `primary.contrastText` (white, unchanged)

## Visual hierarchy

1. Default: transparent background
2. Hover (non-selected): light grey (`grey[50]`)
3. Selected: light blue (`primary.light`)
4. Hover (selected): darker blue (`primary.main`)

This makes the selected item hover more prominent and the non-selected hover more subtle.

Fixed the focus state. Added:

## Focus state fixes

### 1. **Non-selected items (focus)**
- Outline: 2px solid `primary.main` (blue)
- Background: `primary.light` (light blue)
- Text: `primary.contrastText` (white)
- Icon: `primary.contrastText` (white) via sx prop

### 2. **Selected items (focus)**
- Outline: 2px solid `primary.dark` (darker blue)
- Background: `primary.main` (unchanged)
- Text: `primary.contrastText` (white)
- Icon: `primary.contrastText` (white)

### 3. **Focus-visible support**
- Added `:focus` and `:focus-visible` for keyboard navigation
- Outline offset: 2px for visibility
- Icon color updates on focus

When navigating with Tab, focused items show:
- A visible outline
- Background and text colors matching the hover state
- Proper contrast for accessibility

The focus state is now visible and accessible for keyboard navigation.

_**User**_

Use this code as referense for@src/components/side-bar/index.tsx i need you improve accessibility of menu. I created example in simple html, use it:

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>LeadCMS.ai - Dashboard</title>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Skip to main content link for keyboard navigation -->
    <a href="#main-content" class="skip-link">Skip to main content</a>

    <!-- Header -->
    <header role="banner">
        <div class="header">
            <a href="/" class="logo" aria-label="LeadCMS.ai home">
                <svg class="logo-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                    <!-- Logo SVG content -->
                </svg>
                <span>LeadCMS.ai</span>
            </a>
            
            <button 
                type="button" 
                class="toggle-btn" 
                aria-label="Toggle navigation menu"
                aria-expanded="true"
                aria-controls="main-navigation">
                <svg class="toggle-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                    <!-- Toggle icon SVG -->
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </header>

    <!-- Main Navigation -->
    <nav id="main-navigation" aria-label="Main navigation">
        <!-- MAIN Section -->
        <section aria-labelledby="nav-main">
            <h2 id="nav-main" class="nav-section-title">Main</h2>
            <ul role="list">
                <li>
                    <a href="/dashboard" aria-current="page">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Dashboard icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Dashboard</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <!-- CMS Section -->
        <section aria-labelledby="nav-cms">
            <h2 id="nav-cms" class="nav-section-title">CMS</h2>
            <ul role="list">
                <li>
                    <a href="/content">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Content icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Content</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="/media">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Media icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Media</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="/links">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Links icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Links</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <!-- CRM Section -->
        <section aria-labelledby="nav-crm">
            <h2 id="nav-crm" class="nav-section-title">CRM</h2>
            <ul role="list">
                <li>
                    <a href="/contacts">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Contacts icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Contacts</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <!-- MARKETING Section -->
        <section aria-labelledby="nav-marketing">
            <h2 id="nav-marketing" class="nav-section-title">Marketing</h2>
            <ul role="list">
                <li>
                    <a href="/email-templates">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Email templates icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Email templates</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <!-- OPERATIONS Section -->
        <section aria-labelledby="nav-operations">
            <h2 id="nav-operations" class="nav-section-title">Operations</h2>
            <ul role="list">
                <li>
                    <a href="/tasks">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Tasks icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Tasks</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <!-- GENERAL Section -->
        <section aria-labelledby="nav-general">
            <h2 id="nav-general" class="nav-section-title">General</h2>
            <ul role="list">
                <li>
                    <a href="/settings">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Settings icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Settings</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="/users">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Users icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Users</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="/about">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- About icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>About</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </section>
    </nav>

    <!-- Main Content Area -->
    <main id="main-content" role="main">
        <!-- Your main content goes here -->
    </main>

</body>
</html>

        "contents": "export const Sidebar = \n(group) =&gt; (\n(menuItem) =&gt; (\n\n                  &gt;\n                    &lt;span&gt;\n                      &lt;SidebarLink\n                        sx={{\n                          ...(showCollapsed &amp;&amp; {\n                            justifyContent: \"center\",\n                            padding: (theme) =&gt; theme.spacing(1, 0),\n                          }),\n                          \"&amp;:hover .sidebar-icon, &amp;:focus-visible .sidebar-icon\": {\n                            color: (theme) =&gt; theme.palette.primary.contrastText,\n                          },\n                        }}\n                        onClick={(e: React.MouseEvent) =&gt; {\n                          e.preventDefault();\n                          if (typeof menuItem.onClick === \"function\") {\n                            menuItem.onClick(navigate);\n                          }\n                          if (isMobile) toggleMobile();\n                        }}\n                        selected={menuItem.isSelected}\n                        isCollapsed={showCollapsed}\n                      &gt;\n                        &lt;ListItemIconStyled className=\"sidebar-icon\"&gt;\n                          {menuItem.icon}\n                        &lt;/ListItemIconStyled&gt;\n                        &lt;SidebarLinkText\n                          primary={menuItem.label}\n                          {...({ isCollapsed: showCollapsed } as any)}\n                        /&gt;\n                      &lt;/SidebarLink&gt;\n                    &lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;/Tooltip&gt;\n                ))}\n              &lt;/List&gt;\n            ))}\n            &lt;/nav&gt;\n          )}\n        &lt;/SidebarMenuScrollArea&gt;\n      &lt;/SidebarStyled&gt;\n    &lt;/&gt;\n  );\n};",

        },
        "contents": "export const SidebarLink = styled(ListItemButton, {\n  shouldForwardProp: (prop) =&gt; prop !== \"isCollapsed\",\n})&lt;{ isCollapsed?: boolean }&gt;(({ theme, isCollapsed }) =&gt; &#96;\n  border-radius: ${theme.spacing(2)};\n  height: ${theme.spacing(9)};\n  margin-top: ${theme.spacing(1)};\n  margin-left: ${isCollapsed ? theme.spacing(1) : \"0\"};\n  margin-right: ${isCollapsed ? theme.spacing(1) : \"10px\"};\n  color: ${theme.palette.text.primary};\n  min-width: ${isCollapsed ? \"56px\" : \"auto\"};\n  justify-content: ${isCollapsed ? \"center\" : \"flex-start\"};\n  padding-left: ${isCollapsed ? \"0\" : theme.spacing(2)};\n  background-color: transparent;\n  transition: background-color 0.2s ease;\n\n  :hover {\n    background-color: ${theme.palette.primary.light};\n    color: ${theme.palette.primary.contrastText};\n  }\n\n  :focus,\n  :focus-visible {\n    outline: 2px solid ${theme.palette.primary.main};\n    outline-offset: 2px;\n    background-color: ${theme.palette.primary.light};\n    color: ${theme.palette.primary.contrastText};\n  }\n\n  &amp;.Mui-selected {\n    color: ${theme.palette.primary.contrastText};\n    background-color: ${theme.palette.primary.main};\n    font-weight: 600;\n\n    :hover {\n      background-color: ${theme.palette.primary.dark};\n      color: ${theme.palette.primary.contrastText};\n    }\n\n    :focus,\n    :focus-visible {\n      outline: 2px solid ${theme.palette.primary.dark};\n      outline-offset: 2px;\n      background-color: ${theme.palette.primary.main};\n    }\n  }\n&#96;);\n\nexport const SidebarLinkText = styled(ListItemText, {\n  shouldForwardProp: (prop) =&gt; prop !== \"isCollapsed\",\n})\n;",

        "contents": "export const Sidebar = ({\n  menuItems = [],\n  onDrawerStateChange,\n  isLoading = false,\n}: SidebarProps) =&gt; {\n  const theme = useTheme();\n  const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down(\"md\"));\n  const { isOpen, isCollapsed, isMobileOpen, toggleCollapse, toggleMobile } = useSidebar();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n\n  // Notify parent component when drawer state changes\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    if (onDrawerStateChange) {\n      onDrawerStateChange(isMobileOpen);\n    }\n  }, [isMobileOpen, onDrawerStateChange]);\n\n  const navigateToDashboard = useCallback(() =&gt; {\n    navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.dashboard));\n  }, [navigate]);\n\n  const effectiveOpen = isMobile ? isMobileOpen : isOpen;\n  const showCollapsed = !isMobile &amp;&amp; isCollapsed;\n\n  return (\n    &lt;&gt;\n      &lt;SidebarStyled\n        variant={isMobile ? \"temporary\" : \"permanent\"}\n        open={effectiveOpen}\n        onClose={toggleMobile}\n        isCollapsed={showCollapsed}\n      &gt;\n        &lt;SidebarTopContainer isMobile={isMobile} isOpen={effectiveOpen} isCollapsed={showCollapsed}&gt;\n          {\n;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "contents": "export const Sidebar = \n\n        &lt;SidebarMenuScrollArea sx={{ pt: 4 }}&gt;\n          {isLoading ? (\n            &lt;div\n              style={{\n                display: \"flex\",\n                justifyContent: \"center\",\n                alignItems: \"center\",\n                height: \"100%\",\n              }}\n            &gt;\n              &lt;CircularProgress /&gt;\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n          ) : (\n            &lt;nav&gt;\n            {menuItems.map((group) =&gt; (\n              &lt;List\n                key={group.header}\n                subheader={\n                  &lt;ListSubheaderStyled isCollapsed={showCollapsed}&gt;\n                    {group.header}\n                  &lt;/ListSubheaderStyled&gt;\n                }\n                sx={{ mb: 2 }}\n              &gt;\n                {group.items.map((menuItem) =&gt; (\n                  &lt;Tooltip\n                    key={menuItem.id}\n                    title={showCollapsed ? menuItem.label : \"\"}\n                    placement=\"right\"\n                  &gt;\n                    &lt;span&gt;\n                      &lt;SidebarLink\n                        sx=\n                )\n            )\n;",
        "signatures": {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export const Sidebar = ",

            "lineNumber": 93

          {
            "text": "        &lt;SidebarMenuScrollArea sx={{ pt: 4 }}&gt;",

        "contents": "export const Sidebar = \n\n        &lt;SidebarTopContainer isMobile={isMobile} isOpen={effectiveOpen} isCollapsed={showCollapsed}&gt;\n          {!showCollapsed &amp;&amp; (\n            &lt;div\n              className=\"sidebar-logo sidebar-link\"\n              style={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", cursor: \"pointer\", flex: 1 }}\n              onClick={navigateToDashboard}\n              tabIndex={0}\n              role=\"button\"\n              aria-label=\"Go to dashboard\"\n            &gt;\n              &lt;LogoComponent /&gt;\n              &lt;Typography className=\"sidebar-app-name\"&gt;LeadCMS.ai&lt;/Typography&gt;\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n          )}\n\n          {!isMobile &amp;&amp; (\n            &lt;Tooltip title={isCollapsed ? \"Expand sidebar\" : \"Collapse sidebar\"}&gt;\n              &lt;IconButton\n                onClick={toggleCollapse}\n                size=\"small\"\n                sx={{\n                  ml: showCollapsed ? 2 : 1,\n                  pr: showCollapsed ? 2 : 0,\n                }}\n              &gt;\n                {isCollapsed ? &lt;PanelLeftOpen /&gt; : &lt;PanelRightOpen /&gt;}\n              &lt;/IconButton&gt;\n            &lt;/Tooltip&gt;\n          )}\n        &lt;/SidebarTopContainer&gt;\n        &lt;SidebarMenuScrollArea sx={{ pt: 4 }}&gt;\n          {isLoading ?         "contents": "export const SidebarLinkText = styled(ListItemText, {\n  shouldForwardProp: (prop) =&gt; prop !== \"isCollapsed\",\n})&lt;{ isCollapsed?: boolean }&gt;(({ theme, isCollapsed }) =&gt; &#96;\n  .MuiTypography-root {\n    font-weight: 500;\n    font-size: 14px;\n    line-height: 20px;\n    margin-left: ${theme.spacing(1)};\n  }\n\n  display: ${isCollapsed ? \"none\" : \"block\"};\n&#96;);\n\nexport const ListItemIconStyled = styled(ListItemIcon)\n;",

        "contents": "export const ListItemIconStyled = styled(ListItemIcon)&#96;\n  min-width: ${({ theme }) =&gt; theme.spacing(8)};\n  color: ${({ theme }) =&gt; theme.palette.text.secondary};\n  margin-left: ${({ theme }) =&gt; theme.spacing(3)};\n  transition: color 0.2s ease;\n\n  .Mui-selected &amp; {\n    color: ${({ theme }) =&gt; theme.palette.primary.contrastText};\n  }\n&#96; as typeof ListItemIcon;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "export const SidebarStyled = styled(Drawer, {\n  shouldForwardProp: (prop) =&gt; prop !== \"isCollapsed\",\n})&lt;{ isCollapsed?: boolean }&gt;(\n  ({ theme, isCollapsed }) =&gt; &#96;\n  width: ${isCollapsed ? \"65px\" : \"260px\"};\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  transition: width 0.3s ease;\n  .MuiDrawer-paper {\n    width: ${isCollapsed ? \"65px\" : \"260px\"};\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    height: 100vh;\n    box-sizing: border-box;\n    border-right: 1px solid ${theme.palette.divider};\n    background-color: ${theme.palette.background.default};\n    position: fixed;\n    top: 0;\n    padding-bottom: 0;\n    transition: width 0.3s ease;\n    overflow-x: hidden;\n  }\n&#96;\n);\n\nexport const MobileDrawerToggle = styled(IconButton)\n;",
        "signatures": {},

          {

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/build-menu-items.ts",
        "range": {

            "line": 31,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function buildMenuItems(\n  availableEntities: string[] | undefined,\n  selectedModule?: string\n): SidebarMenuSection[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set((availableEntities || []).map((e) =&gt; e.toLowerCase()));\n  const dash = getDashboardAvailability(availableEntities);\n\n  return MENU_CONFIG.map((section) =&gt; {\n    const filteredItems = section.items\n      .filter((item) =&gt; {\n        // For dashboard, also ensure there's at least one tile to show.\n        if (item.id === \"dashboard\") return dash.hasAny;\n        if (!item.entity) return true;\n        return entitySet.has(item.entity.toLowerCase());\n      })\n      .map((item) =&gt; ({\n        ...item,\n        onClick: (navigate: (to: string) =&gt; void) =&gt; navigate(item.route),\n        isSelected: selectedModule === item.id,\n      }));\n    if (filteredItems.length === 0) return null;\n    return { header: section.header, items: filteredItems };\n  }).filter((section): section is SidebarMenuSection =&gt; section !== null);\n}",

        "contents": "export const MENU_CONFIG: SidebarMenuSection[] = [\n\n  {\n    header: \"MARKETING\",\n    items: [\n      {\n        id: \"segments\",\n        label: \"Segments\",\n        icon: &lt;Users size={20} /&gt;,\n        entity: \"segment\",\n        route: getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.segments),\n      },\n      {\n        id: \"emailTemplates\",\n        label: \"Email templates\",\n        icon: &lt;Mail size={20} /&gt;,\n        entity: \"emailtemplate\",\n        route: getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.emailTemplates),\n      },\n      {\n        id: },\n      {\n        id: \"domains\",\n        label: \"Domains\",\n        icon: &lt;Globe size={20} /&gt;,\n        entity: \"domain\",\n        route: getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.domains),\n      },\n    ],\n  },\n  {\n    header: \"OPERATIONS\",\n    items: [\n      {\n        id: \"tasks\",\n        label: \"Tasks\",\n        icon: &lt;ListChecks size={20} /&gt;,\n        route:         "contents": "import zod from \"zod\";\n\nconst FrontmatterSideMenu = zod.object({\n  name: zod.string(),\n  link: zod.string(),\n});\n\nconst FrontmatterValidationScheme = zod.object({\n  seoTitle: zod.string().optional(),\n  seoKeywords: zod.string().optional(),\n  seoDescription: zod.string().optional(),\n  avatar: zod.string().optional(),\n  sidemenu: FrontmatterSideMenu.array().optional(),\n  sourceHref: zod.string().url().optional(),\n});\n\nexport interface ValidateFrontmatterError {\n  errorMessage: string;\n  errorLine: number;\n}\n\ntype ErrorInfo = { _errors: string[] };",

            "column": 1

        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Basic JSX tag validation for MDX content\n */\nfunction validateJsxTags(content: string): SyntaxValidationResult {\n  const lines = content.split(\"\\n\");\n  const tagStack: Array&lt;{ tag: string; line: number }&gt; = [];\n\n  // Regex to match JSX tags (both opening and closing)\n  const jsxTagRegex = /&lt;\\/?([a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*(?:\\.[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*)*)\\s*[^&gt;]*&gt;/g;\n  const selfClosingRegex = /&lt;[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*(?:\\.[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*)*\\s*[^&gt;]*\\/&gt;/g;\n\n  for (let lineIndex = 0; lineIndex &lt; lines.length; lineIndex++) {\n    const line = lines[lineIndex];\n    const lineNumber = lineIndex + 1;\n\n    // Skip code blocks and inline code\n    if (line.trim().startsWith(\"&#96;&#96;&#96;\") || line.includes(\"&#96;\")) {\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    let match;\n    jsxTagRegex.lastIndex = 0; // Reset regex state\n\n    while ((match = jsxTagRegex.exec(line)) !== null) {\n      const fullTag = match[0];\n      const tagName = match[1];\n\n      // Skip self-closing tags\n      if (selfClosingRegex.test(fullTag)) {\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      // Skip HTML void elements\n      const voidElements = [\n        \"area\",\n        \"base\",\n        \"br\",\n        \"col\",\n        \"embed\",\n        \"hr\",\n        \"img\",\n        \"input\",\n        \"meta\",\n        \"param\",\n        \"source\",\n        \"track\",\n        \"wbr\",\n      ];\n      if (voidElements.includes(tagName.toLowerCase())) {\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      if (fullTag.startsWith(\"&lt;/\")) {\n        // Closing tag\n        if\n    }\n  }\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",

            "lineNumber": 315

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/syntax-validators.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 176,
            "column": 2
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 254,
            "column": 3
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Validates MDX syntax using the official MDX compiler\n * This provides comprehensive validation including:\n * - Frontmatter block structure and YAML syntax\n * - JSX component syntax with proper nesting\n * - MDX-specific syntax and expressions\n * - Import/export statements\n * - JavaScript expressions in {expression} syntax\n */\nexport const validateMdxSyntax = async (content: string): Promise&lt;SyntaxValidationResult&gt; =&gt; {\n  if (!content.trim()) {\n    return { isValid: true };\n  }\n\n  // First, validate frontmatter structure and YAML syntax\n  const frontmatterResult = validateFrontmatter(content);\n  if (!frontmatterResult.isValid) {\n    return frontmatterResult;\n  }\n\n  // Then validate the MDX content using the official compiler\n  try {\n    await compile(content, {\n      development: true, // Better error messages in development\n      outputFormat: \"function-body\",\n      // Allow any JSX components without imports for validation\n      jsx: false,\n    });\n\n    return { isValid: true };\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\n    // Extract error information from the compile error\n    let message = \"MDX compilation failed\";\n    let line: number | undefined;\n    let column: number | undefined;\n\n    if (error &amp;&amp; typeof error === \"object\" &amp;&amp; \"message\" in error) {\n      const errorObj = error as { message?: string; line?: number; column?: number };\n      if (errorObj.message) {\n        message = errorObj.message;\n\n        // Try to extract line/column information from error message\n        const lineMatch = message.match(/:(\\d+):(\\d+)/);\n        if (lineMatch) {\n          line = parseInt(lineMatch[1], 10);\n          column = parseInt(lineMatch[2], 10);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Handle VFile errors (common in MDX compilation)\n      if (errorObj.line !== undefined) {\n        line = errorObj.line;\n      }\n      if (errorObj.column !== undefined) {\n        column = errorObj.column;\n      }\n    }\n\n    return {\n      isValid: false,\n      error: {\n        message,\n        line,\n        column,\n        type: \"mdx\",\n      },\n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Basic MDX syntax validation (fallback)\n * This is the current implementation that checks for:\n * - Unmatched JSX tags\n * - Invalid JSX syntax\n * - Frontmatter YAML syntax (if present)\n */",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": " * Validates MDX syntax using the official MDX compiler",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": " * This provides comprehensive validation including:",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Frontmatter block structure and YAML syntax",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": " * - JSX component syntax with proper nesting",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": " * - MDX-specific syntax and expressions",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Import/export statements",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": " * - JavaScript expressions in {expression} syntax",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "export const validateMdxSyntax = async (content: string): Promise&lt;SyntaxValidationResult&gt; =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!content.trim()) {",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "    return { isValid: true };",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "  // First, validate frontmatter structure and YAML syntax",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "  const frontmatterResult = validateFrontmatter(content);",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!frontmatterResult.isValid) {",
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "    return frontmatterResult;",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Then validate the MDX content using the official compiler",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "  try {",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "    await compile(content, {",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "      development: true, // Better error messages in development",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "      outputFormat: \"function-body\",",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Allow any JSX components without imports for validation",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "      jsx: false,",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "    return { isValid: true };",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "  } catch (error: unknown) {",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Extract error information from the compile error",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "    let message = \"MDX compilation failed\";",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "    let line: number | undefined;",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "    let column: number | undefined;",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (error &amp;&amp; typeof error === \"object\" &amp;&amp; \"message\" in error) {",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "text": "      const errorObj = error as { message?: string; line?: number; column?: number };",
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (errorObj.message) {",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "        message = errorObj.message;",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Try to extract line/column information from error message",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "        const lineMatch = message.match(/:(\\d+):(\\d+)/);",
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (lineMatch) {",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "          line = parseInt(lineMatch[1], 10);",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "          column = parseInt(lineMatch[2], 10);",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Handle VFile errors (common in MDX compilation)",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (errorObj.line !== undefined) {",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "        line = errorObj.line;",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (errorObj.column !== undefined) {",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "        column = errorObj.column;",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "    return {",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "      isValid: false,",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "      error: {",
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "        message,",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "text": "        line,",
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "        column,",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "        type: \"mdx\",",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "      },",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": " * Basic MDX syntax validation (fallback)",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": " * This is the current implementation that checks for:",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Unmatched JSX tags",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Invalid JSX syntax",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {

        "contents": "import { rootRoute } from \"lib/router\";\nimport { BreadcrumbLink } from \"types\";\n\nexport const dataListBreadcrumbLinks: BreadcrumbLink[] = [\n  { linkText: \"Dashboard\", toRoute: rootRoute },\n];\n\nexport const countryListStorageKey = \"countryList\";",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/preview-helper.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 32,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const generateSitePreviewUrl = (\n  template: string,\n  params: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;,\n  defaultLanguage?: string\n): string =&gt; {\n  let url = template;\n\n  // Create enhanced params with calculated fields\n  const enhancedParams = { ...params };\n\n  // Calculate lang+slug parameter\n  if (params.language &amp;&amp; params.slug) {\n    const lang = calculateLangPrefix(String(params.language), defaultLanguage);\n    enhancedParams[\"lang+slug\"] = &#96;${lang}${params.slug}&#96;;\n  }\n\n  Object.keys(enhancedParams).forEach((key) =&gt; {\n    // Escape special regex characters in the key\n    const escapedKey = key.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\\]\\\\]/g, \"\\\\$&amp;\");\n    url = url.replace(\n      new RegExp(&#96;\\\\{${escapedKey}\\\\}&#96;, \"g\"),\n      enhancedParams[key] !== undefined ? String(enhancedParams[key]) : \"\"\n    );\n  });\n  return url;\n};\n\nexport const calculateLangPrefix = (contentLanguage: string, defaultLanguage?: string)\n;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export const generateSitePreviewUrl = (",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "  template: string,",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "  params: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;,",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "  defaultLanguage?: string",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "): string =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "  let url = template;",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Create enhanced params with calculated fields",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "  const enhancedParams = { ...params };",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Calculate lang+slug parameter",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (params.language &amp;&amp; params.slug) {",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "    const lang = calculateLangPrefix(String(params.language), defaultLanguage);",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "    enhancedParams[\"lang+slug\"] = &#96;${lang}${params.slug}&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  Object.keys(enhancedParams).forEach((key) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Escape special regex characters in the key",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    const escapedKey = key.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\\]\\\\]/g, \"\\\\$&amp;\");",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    url = url.replace(",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "      new RegExp(&#96;\\\\{${escapedKey}\\\\}&#96;, \"g\"),",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "      enhancedParams[key] !== undefined ? String(enhancedParams[key]) : \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    );",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "  });",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "  return url;",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "export const calculateLangPrefix = (contentLanguage: string, defaultLanguage?: string)",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 33
          }
        ]

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/general-helper.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 127,
            "column": 2
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 138,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function getModuleNameFromUrl(): string {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") return \"\";\n  const path = window.location.pathname;\n  const moduleRaw = path.split(\"/\")[1] || \"\";\n  return moduleRaw\n    .split(\"-\")\n    .filter(Boolean)\n    .map(word =&gt; word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase())\n    .join(\" \");\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export function getModuleNameFromUrl(): string {",
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") return \"\";",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "  const path = window.location.pathname;",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "  const moduleRaw = path.split(\"/\")[1] || \"\";",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "  return moduleRaw",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "    .split(\"-\")",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "    .filter(Boolean)",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "    .map(word =&gt; word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase())",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "    .join(\" \");",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
