    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/syntax-validators.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 405,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 434,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Main validation function that determines the appropriate validator based on format\n * Returns Promise&lt;SyntaxValidationResult&gt; for MDX (async) and SyntaxValidationResult for others\n */\nexport const validateContentSyntax = (\n  content: string,\n  format: string\n): SyntaxValidationResult | Promise&lt;SyntaxValidationResult&gt; =&gt; {\n  const upperFormat = format.toUpperCase();\n\n  switch (upperFormat) {\n    case \"JSON\":\n      return validateJsonSyntax(content);\n    case \"YAML\":\n    case \"YML\":\n      return validateYamlSyntax(content);\n    case \"MDX\":\n    case \"MD\":\n    case \"MARKDOWN\":\n      return validateMdxSyntax(content); // This is now async\n    case \"HTML\":\n      // For HTML, we can use basic JSX validation\n      return validateJsxTags(content);\n    default:\n      // For plain text or unknown formats, always valid\n      return { isValid: true };\n  }\n};",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 408
          },
          {
            "text": " * Main validation function that determines the appropriate validator based on format",
            "lineNumber": 409
          },
          {
            "text": " * Returns Promise&lt;SyntaxValidationResult&gt; for MDX (async) and SyntaxValidationResult for others",
            "lineNumber": 410
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 411
          },
          {
            "text": "export const validateContentSyntax = (",
            "lineNumber": 412
          },
          {
            "text": "  content: string,",
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {
            "text": "  format: string",
            "lineNumber": 414
          },

            "text": "): SyntaxValidationResult | Promise&lt;SyntaxValidationResult&gt; =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 415
          },
          {
            "text": "  const upperFormat = format.toUpperCase();",
            "lineNumber": 416
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "text": "  switch (upperFormat) {",
            "lineNumber": 418
          },
          {
            "text": "    case \"JSON\":",
            "lineNumber": 419
          },
          {
            "text": "      return validateJsonSyntax(content);",
            "lineNumber": 420
          },
          {
            "text": "    case \"YAML\":",
            "lineNumber": 421
          },
          {
            "text": "    case \"YML\":",
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "text": "      return validateYamlSyntax(content);",
            "lineNumber": 423
          },
          {
            "text": "    case \"MDX\":",
            "lineNumber": 424
          },
          {
            "text": "    case \"MD\":",
            "lineNumber": 425
          },
          {
            "text": "    case \"MARKDOWN\":",
            "lineNumber": 426
          },
          {
            "text": "      return validateMdxSyntax(content); // This is now async",
            "lineNumber": 427
          },
          {
            "text": "    case \"HTML\":",
            "lineNumber": 428
          },
          {
            "text": "      // For HTML, we can use basic JSX validation",
            "lineNumber": 429
          },
          {
            "text": "      return validateJsxTags(content);",
            "lineNumber": 430
          },
          {
            "text": "    default:",
            "lineNumber": 431
          },
          {
            "text": "      // For plain text or unknown formats, always valid",
            "lineNumber": 432
          },
          {
            "text": "      return { isValid: true };",
            "lineNumber": 433
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 435
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.07942649722099304
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/syntax-validators.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 309
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 410,
            "column": 3
          }
        },
        "contents": "function validateJsxTags(content: string): SyntaxValidationResult {\nfor (let lineIndex = 0; lineIndex &lt; lines.length; lineIndex++) {\nwhile ((match = jsxTagRegex.exec(line)) !== null) {\n\n\n      if (fullTag.startsWith(\"&lt;/\")) {\n        // Closing tag\n        if (tagStack.length === 0) {\n          return {\n            isValid: false,\n            error: {\n              message: &#96;Unexpected closing tag '&lt;/${tagName}&gt;' - no matching opening tag found&#96;,\n              line: lineNumber,\n              type: \"mdx\",\n            },\n          };\n        }\n\n        const lastOpenTag = tagStack[tagStack.length - 1];\n        if (lastOpenTag.tag !== tagName) {\n          return {\n            isValid: false,\n            error: {\n              message: &#96;Mismatched tag: expected &lt;/${lastOpenTag.tag}&gt; but got &lt;/${tagName}&gt;&#96;,\n              line: lineNumber,\n              type: \"mdx\",\n            },\n          };\n        }\n\n        tagStack.pop();\n      } else {\n        // Opening tag\n        tagStack.push({ tag: tagName, line: lineNumber });\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Check for unclosed tags\n  if (tagStack.length &gt; 0) {\n    const unclosedTag = tagStack[tagStack.length - 1];\n    return {\n      isValid: false,\n      error: {\n        message: &#96;Unclosed tag '&lt;${unclosedTag.tag}&gt;' opened at line ${unclosedTag.line}&#96;,\n        line: unclosedTag.line,\n        type: \"mdx\",\n      },\n    };\n  }\n\n  return { isValid: true };\n}\n\n/**\n * Main validation function that determines the appropriate validator based on format\n * Returns Promise&lt;SyntaxValidationResult&gt; for MDX (async) and SyntaxValidationResult for others\n */",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 310,

              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 311,

            "lineNumber": 407
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",

          },

            "text": " * Returns Promise&lt;SyntaxValidationResult&gt; for MDX (async) and SyntaxValidationResult for others",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/content-status-helper.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 10,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 47,
            "column": 3
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Determines the status of content based on its publishedAt date\n * @param publishedAt The published at date string or null\n * @returns Content status information including status, color, and tooltip\n */\nexport const getContentStatus = (publishedAt: string | null): ContentStatusInfo =&gt; {\n  if (!publishedAt) {\n    return {\n      status: \"Draft\",\n      color: \"warning\",\n    };\n  }\n\n  const publishedDate = new Date(publishedAt);\n  const now = new Date();\n\n  if (publishedDate &gt; now) {\n    return {\n      status: \"Planned\",\n      color: \"info\",\n      tooltip: &#96;Scheduled for ${publishedDate.toLocaleDateString()}&#96;,\n    };\n  }\n\n  return {\n    status: \"Published\",\n    color: \"success\",\n    tooltip: &#96;Published on ${publishedDate.toLocaleDateString()}&#96;,\n  };\n};\n\n/**\n * Get a formatted tooltip title for the content status\n * @param publishedAt The published at date string or null\n * @returns Formatted tooltip string or empty string\n */",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",

      "codeBlock": {

        "range": {

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 405,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Basic MDX syntax validation (fallback)\n * This is the current implementation that checks for:\n * - Unmatched JSX tags\n * - Invalid JSX syntax\n * - Frontmatter YAML syntax (if present)\n */\nexport const validateMdxSyntaxBasic = (content: string): SyntaxValidationResult =&gt; {\n  if (!content.trim()) {\n    return { isValid: true };\n  }\n\n  // First, check frontmatter if it exists\n  const frontmatterMatch = content.match(/^---\\s*\\n(.*?)\\n---\\s*\\n/s);\n  if (frontmatterMatch) {\n    const frontmatterContent = frontmatterMatch[1];\n    const yamlResult = validateYamlSyntax(frontmatterContent);\n    if (!yamlResult.isValid) {\n      const yamlError = yamlResult.error;\n      if (!yamlError) return { isValid: true }; // This shouldn't happen but satisfies TypeScript\n\n      return {\n        isValid: false,\n        error: {\n          ...yamlError,\n          message: &#96;Frontmatter error: ${yamlError.message}&#96;,\n          type: \"mdx\",\n          // Adjust line numbers to account for frontmatter position\n          line: yamlError.line ? yamlError.line + 1 : undefined,\n        },\n      };\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Remove frontmatter for JSX validation\n  const contentWithoutFrontmatter = content.replace(/^---\\s*\\n(.*?)\\n---\\s*\\n/s, \"\");\n\n  // Basic JSX tag matching validation\n  const result = validateJsxTags(contentWithoutFrontmatter);\n  if (!result.isValid) {\n    // Adjust line numbers if frontmatter was present\n    const frontmatterLines = frontmatterMatch ? frontmatterMatch[0].split(\"\\n\").length - 1 : 0;\n    const resultError = result.error;\n    if (!resultError) return { isValid: true }; // This shouldn't happen but satisfies TypeScript\n\n    return {\n      isValid: false,\n      error: {\n        ...resultError,\n        type: \"mdx\",\n        line: resultError.line ? resultError.line + frontmatterLines : undefined,\n      },\n    };\n  }\n\n  return { isValid: true };\n};\n\n/**\n * Basic JSX tag validation for MDX content\n */\nfunction validateJsxTags(content: string): SyntaxValidationResult {\n  const lines = content.split(\"\\n\");\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "export const validateMdxSyntaxBasic = (content: string): SyntaxValidationResult =&gt; {",

          },

            "text": "  }",

            "lineNumber": 306
          },

            "text": "/**",

            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 309

            "text": "function validateJsxTags(content: string): SyntaxValidationResult {",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/preview-helper.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 32,
            "column": 2
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 60,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const openSitePreview = (\n  params: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;,\n  template: string,\n  defaultLanguage?: string\n): boolean =&gt; {\n  // Generate the preview URL (this will calculate lang+slug and other enhanced params)\n  const previewUrl = generateSitePreviewUrl(template, params, defaultLanguage);\n\n  // Check if there are still unresolved placeholders after URL generation\n  const unresolvedPlaceholders = previewUrl.match(/{(.*?)}/g) || [];\n\n  if (unresolvedPlaceholders.length &gt; 0) {\n    const missingKeys = unresolvedPlaceholders.map((k) =&gt; k.replace(/[{}]/g, \"\"));\n    console.debug(\"[PreviewHelper] Missing required params for site preview:\", missingKeys, {\n      params,\n      template,\n      previewUrl,\n    });\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  console.log(\"[PreviewHelper] Opening site preview:\", previewUrl);\n\n  // Open in new tab\n  window.open(previewUrl, \"_blank\", \"noopener,noreferrer\");\n  return true;\n};",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export const openSitePreview = (",
            "lineNumber": 35

            "text": "  params: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;,",

            "lineNumber": 38

            "lineNumber": 42

            "lineNumber": 48

            "text": "  // Open in new tab",

            "lineNumber": 59
          },

            "text": "  return true;",
            "lineNumber": 60

          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 61

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/import-file-helper.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 58,
            "column": 2
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 102,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "contents": "const typeMapping: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {\n  string: \"input\",\n  integer: \"input\",\n  boolean: \"checkbox\",\n  enum: \"select\",\n  array: \"input\",\n};\n\nexport const getImportFields = (importModel: any) =&gt; {\n  const importContactFields = Object.keys(importModel)\n    .map((key) =&gt; {\n      const property = importModel[key];\n\n      if (!property.type) {\n        return; // skip the field if property.type is undefined\n      }\n\n      const importType = typeMapping[property.type] ? typeMapping[property.type] : \"input\";\n      let example = property.example ? property.example : \"string\";\n\n      if (example instanceof Array || example instanceof Object) {\n        example = JSON.stringify(example);\n      }\n\n      const alternatives = getAlternatives(key, property.title);\n      const title = property.title ? property.title : key;\n      const validations = buildValidations(key, property);\n\n      return {\n        key,\n        label: title,\n        alternateMatches: alternatives,\n        fieldType: {\n          type: importType,\n        },\n        example: example,\n        validations: validations,\n      };\n    })\n    .filter(Boolean);\n\n  return importContactFields;\n};",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Get a formatted tooltip title for the content status\n * @param publishedAt The published at date string or null\n * @returns Formatted tooltip string or empty string\n */\nexport const getContentStatusTooltip = (publishedAt: string | null): string =&gt; {\n  if (!publishedAt) {\n    return \"\";\n  }\n\n  const publishedDate = new Date(publishedAt);\n  const now = new Date();\n\n  if (publishedDate &gt; now) {\n    return &#96;Scheduled for ${publishedDate.toLocaleDateString()}&#96;;\n  }\n\n  return &#96;Published on ${publishedDate.toLocaleDateString()}&#96;;\n};",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",

            "text": " * Get a formatted tooltip title for the content status",

          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "export const getContentStatusTooltip = (publishedAt: string | null): string =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!publishedAt) {",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "    return \"\";",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "  const publishedDate = new Date(publishedAt);",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  const now = new Date();",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (publishedDate &gt; now) {",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },

            "lineNumber": 58

          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 59

            "lineNumber": 60
          },

            "text": "  return &#96;Published on ${publishedDate.toLocaleDateString()}&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 61

            "lineNumber": 62
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/preview-helper.ts",
        "range": {

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const calculateLangPrefix = (contentLanguage: string, defaultLanguage?: string): string =&gt; {\n  if (!contentLanguage || !defaultLanguage || contentLanguage === defaultLanguage) {\n    return \"\";\n  }\n  return &#96;${contentLanguage}/&#96;;\n};\n\nexport const openSitePreview = (\n  params: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;,\n;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export const calculateLangPrefix = (contentLanguage: string, defaultLanguage?: string): string =&gt; {",

            "text": "  if (!contentLanguage || !defaultLanguage || contentLanguage === defaultLanguage) {",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },

          },

            "text": "  }",

          },

            "text": "};",

            "text": "export const openSitePreview = (",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/formik-helper.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 5
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 75,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export async function execSubmitWithToast&lt;T&gt;(\n  values: T,\n  helpers: FormikHelpers&lt;T&gt;,\n  submitFunc: (values: T, helpers: FormikHelpers&lt;T&gt;) =&gt; Promise&lt;void&gt;,\n  notificationsService: NotificationsService,\n  showErrorModalFunc: (value: string[]) =&gt; void,\n  entityName: string,\n  options?: {\n    fieldMapping?: Record&lt;string, string&gt;;\n    customValidationErrorMessage?: string;\n  }\n): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n {\n    pending: &#96;Saving ${nameWithMinFirstLetter}...&#96;,\n    success: &#96;${nameWithCapFirstLetter} saved successfully&#96;,\n    error: (error: unknown) =&gt; {\n      // Cast error to the expected structure for type safety\n      const httpError = error as ErrorResponse;\n\n      // Try to handle validation errors first using the generic error handler\n      const handleValidationErrors = async () =&gt; {\n        try {\n          await handleFormError(error, {\n            formik: helpers,\n            notificationsService,\n            fieldMapping: options?.fieldMapping || {},\n            customErrorMessage: options?.customValidationErrorMessage,\n            showGenericError: false, // We'll handle generic errors below\n          });\n          return true; // Validation errors were handled\n        } catch {\n          return false; // Not validation errors or couldn't handle them\n        }\n      };\n\n      // Check if this is a validation error that we can handle\n      if (httpError?.status === 422 || httpError?.status === 400) {\n        handleValidationErrors();\n        // Still show the error modal for details\n      }\n\n      // Prepare error details for the modal and toast\n      const errMessage = &#96;Unable to save ${entityName}. An error occurred.&#96;;\n      const errDetails: string[] = [];\n\n      if (httpError?.data?.error?.title) {\n        errDetails.push(httpError.data.error.title);\n      }\n      if (httpError?.data?.message) {\n        errDetails.push(httpError.data.message);\n      }\n      if (httpError?.data?.error?.errors) {\n        errDetails.push(...networkErrorToStringArray(httpError.data.error.errors));\n      }\n\n      return {\n        title: errMessage,\n        onClick:\n          errDetails.length &gt; 0\n            ? () =&gt; {\n                showErrorModalFunc(errDetails);\n              }\n            : undefined,\n      };\n    },\n  });\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},

            "line": 75,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "import { FormikHelpers } from \"formik\";\nimport { NotificationsService } from \"@hooks\";\nimport { networkErrorToStringArray } from \"./general-helper\";\nimport { handleFormError, ErrorResponse } from \"./error-handler\";\n\nexport async function execSubmitWithToast&lt;T&gt;(\n  values: T,\n  helpers: FormikHelpers&lt;T&gt;,\n  submitFunc: (values: T, helpers: FormikHelpers&lt;T&gt;) =&gt; Promise&lt;void&gt;,\n  notificationsService: NotificationsService,\n  showErrorModalFunc: (value: string[]) =&gt; void,\n  entityName: string,\n  options?: {\n    fieldMapping?: Record&lt;string, string&gt;;\n    customValidationErrorMessage?: string;\n  }\n): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n  const nameWithCapFirstLetter =\n    entityName.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + entityName.slice(1).toLowerCase();\n  const nameWithMinFirstLetter = entityName.toLowerCase();\n\n  notificationsService.promise(submitFunc(values, helpers), {\n    pending: &#96;Saving ${nameWithMinFirstLetter}...&#96;,\n    success: &#96;${nameWithCapFirstLetter} saved successfully&#96;,\n\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/general-helper.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 96,
            "column": 2
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 138,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const execDeleteWithToast = async (\n  deleteFunc: () =&gt; Promise&lt;void&gt;,\n  notificationsService: NotificationsService,\n  entity: string,\n  showErrorModalFunc: (value: string[]) =&gt; void\n) =&gt; {\n  const entityNameWithCapFirstLetter =\n    entity.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + entity.slice(1).toLowerCase();\n  notificationsService.promise(deleteFunc(), {\n    pending: &#96;Deleting ${entity}&#96;,\n    success: &#96;${entityNameWithCapFirstLetter} deleted successfully&#96;,\n    error: (error) =&gt; {\n      const errMessage = &#96;Unable to delete ${entity}. An error occurred.&#96;;\n      const errDetails: string[] = [];\n      if (error.data?.error?.title) {\n        errDetails.push(error.data.error.title);\n      }\n      if (error.data?.message) {\n        errDetails.push(error.data.message);\n      }\n      if (error.data?.error?.errors) {\n        errDetails.push(...networkErrorToStringArray(error.data.error.errors));\n      }\n      return {\n        title: errMessage,\n        onClick: errDetails.length &gt; 0 ? () =&gt; showErrorModalFunc(errDetails) : undefined,\n      };\n    },\n  });\n};\n\nexport function getModuleNameFromUrl(): string {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") return \"\";\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/general-helper.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 52,
            "column": 2
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 79,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const getFormattedDateTime = (dateToConvert: string) =&gt; {\n  const date = new Date(dateToConvert);\n  const formattedDate = date.toLocaleDateString(undefined, {\n    year: \"numeric\",\n    month: \"2-digit\",\n    day: \"2-digit\",\n  });\n  const formattedTime = date.toLocaleTimeString(undefined, {\n    hour: \"numeric\",\n    minute: \"numeric\",\n    second: \"numeric\",\n    hour12: true,\n  });\n  const formattedDateTime = &#96;${formattedDate}  ${formattedTime}&#96;;\n  return formattedDateTime;\n};\n\nexport const getFormattedDateOnly = (dateToConvert: string) =&gt;\n;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export const getFormattedDateTime = (dateToConvert: string) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "  const date = new Date(dateToConvert);",
            "lineNumber": 56

## Accessibility improvements

### 1. **Semantic HTML structure**
- Added `<nav>` with `id="main-navigation"` and `aria-label="Main navigation"`
- Wrapped menu groups in `<section>` elements with `aria-labelledby`
- Added `<h2>` headings for section headers with unique IDs
- Used `<li>` with `role="none"` for list items (wrapped in Tooltip)

### 2. **ARIA attributes**
- Logo link: `aria-label="LeadCMS.ai home"`
- Toggle button: `aria-expanded`, `aria-controls="main-navigation"`, `aria-label`
- Section headers: unique IDs (`nav-main`, `nav-cms`, etc.) with `aria-labelledby`
- Menu items: `aria-current="page"` for the current page
- Icons: `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"` for decorative icons
- Lists: `role="list"` for proper list semantics

### 3. **Navigation improvements**
- Converted logo from `<div>` with onClick to `<GhostLink>` (proper anchor)
- Converted menu items from onClick handlers to `<GhostLink>` components
- Proper Link components enable right-click "Open in new tab" and better keyboard navigation

### 4. **Icon accessibility**
- Icons are cloned with `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`
- Screen readers skip decorative icons and focus on text labels

### 5. **Keyboard navigation**
- Focus states already implemented
- Proper Link components work with keyboard navigation
- ARIA attributes help screen readers understand structure

The sidebar is now more accessible and follows WCAG guidelines. Screen readers can navigate the structure, and keyboard users can interact with all elements.

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const ModuleWrapper = ({\n  leftContainerChildren,\n  extraActionsContainerChildren,\n  addButtonContainerChildren,\n  actionButtons,\n  isForm = false,\n  fullWidth: propFullWidth,\n  children,\n}: ModuleWrapperProps) =&gt; {\n  const { isBusy } = useModuleWrapperContext();\n  const { fullWidth: contextFullWidth } = useLayout();\n\n  // Use prop fullWidth if provided, otherwise use context fullWidth\n  const fullWidth = propFullWidth ?? contextFullWidth;\n\n  const rightActions = [\n    ...flattenChildren(extraActionsContainerChildren),\n    addButtonContainerChildren,\n  ].filter(React.isValidElement);\n\n  return (\n    &lt;ModuleContainer fullWidth={fullWidth}&gt;\n      {(leftContainerChildren || extraActionsContainerChildren || addButtonContainerChildren) &amp;&amp; (\n        &lt;ActionsContainer&gt;\n          {leftContainerChildren &amp;&amp; &lt;LeftContainer&gt;{leftContainerChildren}&lt;/LeftContainer&gt;}\n          {(extraActionsContainerChildren || addButtonContainerChildren) &amp;&amp; (\n            &lt;RightContainer&gt;\n              &lt;ResponsiveActions actions={rightActions} gap={3} /&gt;\n            &lt;/RightContainer&gt;\n          )}\n        &lt;/ActionsContainer&gt;\n      )}\n      &lt;ModuleContentContainer&gt;\n        &lt;ScrollContainer id=\"scrollTarget\"&gt;\n          {isForm ? &lt;FormContainer&gt;{children}&lt;/FormContainer&gt; : children}\n        &lt;/ScrollContainer&gt;\n        {actionButtons &amp;&amp; &lt;FixedActionBar&gt;{actionButtons}&lt;/FixedActionBar&gt;}\n        {isBusy &amp;&amp; (\n          &lt;&gt;\n            &lt;LoadingIndicatorContainer /&gt;\n            &lt;CenteredCircularProgress size={40} thickness={4} /&gt;\n          &lt;/&gt;\n        )}\n      &lt;/ModuleContentContainer&gt;\n    &lt;/ModuleContainer&gt;\n  );\n};\n\nfunction flattenChildren(children: React.ReactNode): React.ReactElement[] {\n  const result: React.ReactElement[] = [];\n}",

        },
        "contents": "export const ModuleLoader = () =&gt; {\n  const { moduleName } = useParams&lt;ModuleRouteParams&gt;();\n\n  return (\n    &lt;ModuleWrapperProvider&gt;\n      &lt;ErrorBoundary FallbackComponent={ErrorBoundaryFallbackPage} resetKeys={[moduleName]}&gt;\n        &lt;Suspense fallback=\"Loading...\"&gt;\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.content &amp;&amp; &lt;ContentModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.contacts &amp;&amp; &lt;ContactsModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.unsubscribes &amp;&amp; &lt;UnsubscribesModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.links &amp;&amp; &lt;LinksModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.comments &amp;&amp; &lt;CommentsModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.accounts &amp;&amp; &lt;AccountsModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.orders &amp;&amp; &lt;OrdersModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.domains &amp;&amp; &lt;DomainsModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.segments &amp;&amp; &lt;SegmentsModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.users &amp;&amp; &lt;UserModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.about &amp;&amp; &lt;AboutModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.emailTemplates &amp;&amp; &lt;EmailTemplatesModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.activityLogs &amp;&amp; &lt;ActivityLogModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.dashboard &amp;&amp; &lt;DashboardModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.media &amp;&amp; &lt;MediaModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.settings &amp;&amp; &lt;SettingsModule /&gt;}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.tasks &amp;&amp; &lt;TasksModule /&gt;}\n          {!moduleName &amp;&amp; &lt;Navigate to={defaultModuleRoute} replace /&gt;}\n        &lt;/Suspense&gt;\n      &lt;/ErrorBoundary&gt;\n    &lt;/ModuleWrapperProvider&gt;\n  );\n};",

        "contents": "import ReactDOM from \"react-dom/client\";\nimport { App } from \"./app\";\nimport { SidebarProvider } from \"@providers/sidebar-provider\";\n\nconst rootNode = document.getElementById(\"root\");\nif (rootNode) {\n  ReactDOM.createRoot(rootNode).render(\n    &lt;SidebarProvider&gt;\n      &lt;App /&gt;\n    &lt;/SidebarProvider&gt;\n  );\n}",

        "contents": "export const ContentList = \nconst extraActions = [\n\n    /&gt;,\n  ];\n\n  return (\n    &lt;ModuleWrapper\n      breadcrumbs={[]}\n      currentBreadcrumb={\"Content\"}\n      leftContainerChildren={searchBar}\n      extraActionsContainerChildren={extraActions}\n      addButtonContainerChildren={\n        &lt;Box sx={{ display: \"flex\", gap: 1 }}&gt;\n          &lt;Button\n            variant=\"contained\"\n            to={\n              selectedContentType\n                ? &#96;/content/new?contentType=${selectedContentType}&#96;\n                : \"/content/new\"\n            }\n            component={GhostLink}\n            startIcon={&lt;Plus size={18} /&gt;}\n          &gt;\n            Add Content\n          &lt;/Button&gt;\n          {config?.capabilities?.includes(\"AIAssistance\") &amp;&amp; (\n            &lt;Button\n              variant=\"outlined\"\n              onClick={handleAIDraftClick}\n              startIcon={&lt;Sparkles size={18} /&gt;}\n            &gt;\n              Create with AI\n            &lt;/Button&gt;\n          )}\n        &lt;/Box&gt;\n      }\n    &gt;\n      &lt;CustomFilterBar\n        columns={contentFilterColumns}\n        whereFilters={whereFilters}\n        addFilter={addFilter}\n        removeFilter={removeFilter}\n        filterPanelOpen={filterPanelOpen}\n        setFilterPanelOpen={setFilterPanelOpen}\n        clearAllFilters={clearAllFilters}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* Content Type Filter */}\n      &lt;Box sx={{ mb: 3 }}&gt;\n        &lt;ContentTypeFilter\n          selectedContentType={selectedContentType}\n          onContentTypeChange={handleContentTypeChange}\n          statistics={statistics}\n        /&gt;\n      &lt;/Box&gt;\n      &lt;NoRecordsDisplay\n        visible={!isLoading &amp;&amp; contentItemsCount === 0}\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/app.tsx",

            "line": 142,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const App = \n\n\n  function useBreadcrumbs(\n    pathname: string,\n    propsBreadcrumbs?: Breadcrumb[],\n    propsCurrentBreadcrumb?: string\n  ) {\n    if (propsBreadcrumbs &amp;&amp; propsBreadcrumbs.length &gt; 0) {\n      return { breadcrumbs: propsBreadcrumbs, currentBreadcrumb: propsCurrentBreadcrumb || \"\" };\n    }\n    const paths = pathname.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);\n    const firstPath = paths[0];\n    const breadcrumbs: Breadcrumb[] = [];\n    let currentBreadcrumb = \"\";\n    if (firstPath &amp;&amp; menuCategories[firstPath]) {\n      breadcrumbs.push({\n        linkText: menuCategories[firstPath].category,\n        toRoute: &#96;/${firstPath}&#96;,\n        isCategory: true,\n      });\n      currentBreadcrumb = menuCategories[firstPath].name;\n    }\n    return { breadcrumbs, currentBreadcrumb };\n  }\n\n  function AppLayoutWithAutoBreadcrumbs({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {\n    const location = useLocation();\n    const { fullWidth } = useLayout();\n    let propsBreadcrumbs, propsCurrentBreadcrumb;\n    if (children &amp;&amp; typeof children === \"object\" &amp;&amp; \"props\" in children &amp;&amp; children.props) {\n      propsBreadcrumbs = children.props.breadcrumbs;\n      propsCurrentBreadcrumb = children.props.currentBreadcrumb;\n    }\n    const { breadcrumbs, currentBreadcrumb } = useBreadcrumbs(\n      location.pathname,\n      propsBreadcrumbs,\n      propsCurrentBreadcrumb\n    );\n    return (\n      &lt;AppLayout\n        breadcrumbs={breadcrumbs}\n        currentBreadcrumb={currentBreadcrumb}\n        fullWidth={fullWidth}\n      &gt;\n        {children}\n      &lt;/AppLayout&gt;\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    &lt;LocalizationProvider dateAdapter={AdapterDayjs}&gt;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {

            "line": 579,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const ContentList = \n\n\n      &lt;ContentListContainer&gt;\n        {isLoading &amp;&amp; contentItems.length === 0 ? (\n          &lt;Box display=\"flex\" justifyContent=\"center\" alignItems=\"center\" minHeight={300}&gt;\n            &lt;CircularProgress /&gt;\n          &lt;/Box&gt;\n        ) : (\n          &lt;&gt;\n            &lt;InfiniteScroll\n              dataLength={contentItems.length}\n              next={fetchData}\n              hasMore={contentItemsCount !== contentItems.length}\n              loader={contentItems.length &lt; contentItemsCount ? &lt;h4&gt;Loading...&lt;/h4&gt; : null}\n              hasChildren={true}\n              scrollableTarget=\"scrollTarget\"\n              style={{ overflow: \"unset\" }}\n            &gt;\n              &lt;Grid container spacing={4} id=\"scrollTarget\" ref={scrollTargetRef}&gt;\n                {contentItems.map((item) =&gt; (\n                  &lt;Grid\n                    size={{ xs: 12, sm: 6, md: 4, lg: 2.4 }}\n                    key={&#96;content-${item.id}&#96;}\n                    sx={{ mb: 3, minWidth: 290, maxWidth: 330 }}\n                  &gt;\n                    &lt;ItemCard\n                      item={item}\n                      onDelete={handleDeleteClick}\n                      onTranslate={handleTranslate}\n                      hasSitePreview={hasSitePreview}\n                      previewUrlTemplate={configSettings?.PreviewUrlTemplate}\n                      defaultLanguage={defaultLanguage}\n                      hasMultipleLanguages={(config?.languages?.length || 0) &gt; 1}\n                      key={&#96;content-card-${item.id}&#96;}\n                    /&gt;\n                  &lt;/Grid&gt;\n                ))}\n              &lt;/Grid&gt;\n            &lt;/InfiniteScroll&gt;\n          &lt;/&gt;\n        )}\n        {/* Delete dialog */}\n        &lt;Dialog open={isDeleteDialogOpen} onClose={handleDeleteCancel}&gt;\n          &lt;DialogTitle&gt;Delete Content&lt;/DialogTitle&gt;\n;",
        "signatures": {

        "contents": "export const ContentEditContainer = styled(\"div\")&#96;\n  flex-grow: 1;\n  width: 100%;\n  height: 100%;\n  max-width: 100%;\n  min-height: calc(100vh - 144px); /* Ensure proper loading positioning */\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  align-items: stretch;\n  justify-content: stretch;\n  padding: 0;\n&#96;;\n\nexport const ContentDeleteContainer = styled(\"div\")\n;",
        "signatures": {},

        "contents": "export const ContentEdit = \n\n                              &lt;MDXEditorNew\n                                key={mdxEditorKey}\n                                onChange={async (value) =&gt; {\n                                  contentFormOps.setWasModified(true);\n                                  await contentFormOps.formik.setFieldValue(\"body\", value || \"\");\n                                }}\n                                onContentChangeStatus={(hasChanged) =&gt; {\n                                  contentFormOps.setHasContentChanged(hasChanged);\n                                }}\n                                value={contentFormOps.formik.values.body}\n                                isReadOnly={props.readonly}\n                                contentDetails={contentFormOps.formik.values}\n                                livePreview={\n                                  contentFormOps.useLivePreview &amp;&amp; canShowLivePreviewPane\n                                }\n                                livePreviewTemplate={getPreviewTemplate()}\n                                isMetadataCollapsed={isMetadataCollapsed}\n                                preloadedMdxComponents={contentDataOps.preloadedMdxComponents}\n                                originalContentForDiff={contentFormOps.originalContent}\n                                contentFormat={resolvedFormat as ContentFormat}\n                              /&gt;\n                              {/* Show validation bubble when preview pane is not visible */}\n                              {(!canShowLivePreviewPane ||\n                                !contentFormOps.useLivePreview ||\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "contents": "import { Route, Routes } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ContentEdit } from \"./content-edit\";\n\nexport const ContentModule = () =&gt; {\n  return (\n    &lt;Routes&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/\"} element={&lt;ContentList /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/new\"} element={&lt;ContentEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/ai-draft\"} element={&lt;ContentEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/:sourceId/duplicate\"} element={&lt;ContentEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/:sourceId/translate/:targetLanguage/:type\"} element={&lt;ContentEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/:sourceId/translate/:targetLanguage\"} element={&lt;ContentEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n      &lt;Route path={\"/:id/edit\"} element={&lt;ContentEdit /&gt;} /&gt;\n    &lt;/Routes&gt;\n  );\n};",
        "signatures": {},

          {

        "contents": "export const ContentEdit = \n\n\n  return (\n    &lt;form onSubmit={handleFormSubmit}&gt;\n      &lt;ModuleWrapper\n        breadcrumbs={[]}\n        currentBreadcrumb={contentFormOps.formik.values.title}\n        isForm={true}\n        actionButtons={\n          &lt;ContentEditActionButtons\n            isSubmitting={contentFormOps.formik.isSubmitting}\n            wasModified={contentFormOps.wasModified}\n            coverWasModified={contentFormOps.coverWasModified}\n            isSaving={contentFormOps.isSaving}\n            id={id}\n            isCreateMode={isCreateMode}\n            isDuplicateMode={isDuplicateMode}\n            isTranslationMode={isTranslationMode}\n            hasMultipleLanguages={hasMultipleLanguages}\n            hasAIAssistance={hasAIAssistance}\n            onTranslate={() =&gt; setTranslateDialogOpen(true)}\n            onEditWithAI={() =&gt; setAiEditDialogOpen(true)}\n          /&gt;\n        }\n      &gt;\n        &lt;RestoreDataModal\n          isOpen={restoreDataState === ContentEditRestoreState.Requested}\n          onClose={(value) =&gt;\n            value\n              ? setRestoreDataState(ContentEditRestoreState.Accepted)\n              : setRestoreDataState(ContentEditRestoreState.Rejected)\n          }\n        /&gt;\n\n        &lt;ContentEditContainer&gt;\n          {\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/features/content/content-edit/index.tsx",

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "const METADATA_COLLAPSED_STORAGE_KEY = \"content-metadata-collapsed\";\n\nexport const ContentEdit = (props: ContentEditProps) =&gt; {\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const location = useLocation();\n  const { config } = useConfig();\n  const userInfo = useUserInfo();\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n  const { selectedLanguage } = useGlobalLanguageFilter();\n  const { setFullWidth } = useLayout();\n\n  // Set full width layout for content editor\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    setFullWidth(true);\n    return () =&gt; {\n      setFullWidth(false);\n    };\n  }, [setFullWidth]);\n\n  // Route parameters\n  const {\n    id,\n    sourceId: routeSourceId,\n    targetLanguage: routeTargetLanguage,\n    type: routeType,\n  } = useParams();\n  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();\n\n  // Support both route params (new) and query params (legacy)\n  const sourceId = routeSourceId || searchParams.get(\"sourceId\");\n  const translateToParam = routeTargetLanguage || searchParams.get(\"translateTo\");\n  const translationTypeParam =\n    (routeType as TranslationType) || (searchParams.get(\"type\") as TranslationType | null);\n\n  // Determine operation modes\n  const aiGeneratedContent = location.state?.aiGeneratedContent;\n  const isAIDraftRoute = location.pathname.includes(\"/ai-draft\");\n  const isAIDraftMode = !!aiGeneratedContent || isAIDraftRoute;\n  const isDuplicateMode = !!sourceId &amp;&amp; !translateToParam;\n  const isTranslationMode = !!translateToParam;\n  const isCreateMode = !id &amp;&amp; !isDuplicateMode &amp;&amp; !isTranslationMode &amp;&amp; !isAIDraftMode;\n\n  // UI state\n  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState&lt;string&gt;(\"content\");\n  const [restoreDataState, setRestoreDataState] = useState&lt;ContentEditRestoreState&gt;(\n    ContentEditRestoreState.Idle\n  );\n  const [storedMetadataCollapsed, setStoredMetadataCollapsed] = useLocalStorage(\n    METADATA_COLLAPSED_STORAGE_KEY,\n    false\n  );\n  const [localMetadataCollapsed, setLocalMetadataCollapsed] = useState(false);\n\n  // Dialog states\n  const [translateDialogOpen, setTranslateDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "const METADATA_COLLAPSED_STORAGE_KEY = \"content-metadata-collapsed\";",

            "lineNumber": 90

          {
            "text": "export const ContentEdit = (props: ContentEditProps) =&gt; {",

          {
            "text": "  const { setFullWidth } = useLayout();",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Set full width layout for content editor",

          {

            "lineNumber": 105
          },

            "text": "  }, [setFullWidth]);",

          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Route parameters",
            "lineNumber": 108

          {

            "lineNumber": 119

            "text": "    (routeType as TranslationType) || (searchParams.get(\"type\") as TranslationType | null);",

            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {

            "text": "    false",

            "text": "  );",
            "lineNumber": 139

---

Added a skip link for keyboard navigation.

## Changes Made:

### 1. **Created SkipLink Component** (`index.styled.tsx`)
   - Hidden by default (`top: -40px`)
   - Visible on focus (`top: 0`)
   - Styled with primary colors and focus outline
   - High z-index to appear above other content

### 2. **Added Skip Link to Layout** (`index.tsx`)
   - Placed at the top of the layout (before sidebar and main content)
   - Links to `#main-content`

### 3. **Updated Main Content** (`index.tsx`)
   - Added `id="main-content"` for the skip link target
   - Added `role="main"` for semantic HTML

## How it works:

- Hidden by default (off-screen)
- On Tab focus, it slides into view at the top
- Clicking it scrolls to the main content
- Helps keyboard users skip navigation

The skip link follows accessibility best practices and improves keyboard navigation.

---
